---
title: "Usage for Textbooks Bought for VolBooks Fall 2024 to Spring 2026"
author: "Alexander Harriman"
date: "2025-11-26"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```



This file combines usage data from the usage database with the other metrics calculated from the Textbook Tracking Sheet to create a PowerBI report of the value and reach of the VolBooks-Libraries parternship as part of the Total Access Program.

The Textbook Tracking Sheet is necessary for the Alma-specific snapshots in time data. That sheet can be found here: https://liveutk.sharepoint.com/:x:/r/sites/UTLibraryAssessmentProgramsCollectionStrategy/_layouts/15/Doc.aspx?sourcedoc=%7B20A3FEE4-BC62-47BE-BA09-FBC33A8E64AF%7D&file=Textbook%20Tracking%20Sheet.xlsx&action=default&mobileredirect=true

This file has the per-semester usage correct up to Spring 2026.


Throughout this file, things that need to be updated for each new semester will be documented with what steps need to be taken.


```{r, warning = FALSE}
library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
library(readr)
library(openxlsx)
library(ggplot2)
library(gt)
library(stringr)
library(tidyr)
library(writexl)
library(RSQLite)
library(DBI)
library(xml2)
library(rvest)
```



# Load the Bookstore Books for Each Semester


This should have the final list sent to VolBooks for each semester; if you are actively creating lists, wait until the last one is created.


FOR EACH NEW SEMESTER, copy the code block (not for Spring 2024) and edit the variable names to show each semester.

```{r, warning = FALSE}
booksSpring24 <- read_excel('Final Spring 2024 Bookstore List Apr 11.xlsx') |>
  mutate(`Section Code` = `Course Code`) 

for(i in 1:dim(booksSpring24)[1]){
  booksSpring24$`Course Code`[i] <- case_when(
    nchar(str_split(str_split(booksSpring24$`Section Code`[i], '-')[[1]][2], '\\.')[[1]][1]) == 4 ~ substr(booksSpring24$`Section Code`[i], 8, 15),
    nchar(str_split(str_split(booksSpring24$`Section Code`[i], '-')[[1]][2], '\\.')[[1]][1]) == 3 ~ substr(booksSpring24$`Section Code`[i], 8, 14),
    nchar(str_split(str_split(booksSpring24$`Section Code`[i], '-')[[1]][2], '\\.')[[1]][1]) == 2 ~ substr(booksSpring24$`Section Code`[i], 8, 13)
  )
  
  booksSpring24$`Subject Area`[i] <- case_when(
    nchar(str_split(str_split(booksSpring24$`Section Code`[i], '-')[[1]][2], '\\.')[[1]][1]) == 4 ~ substr(booksSpring24$`Section Code`[i], 8, 11),
    nchar(str_split(str_split(booksSpring24$`Section Code`[i], '-')[[1]][2], '\\.')[[1]][1]) == 3 ~ substr(booksSpring24$`Section Code`[i], 8, 10),
    nchar(str_split(str_split(booksSpring24$`Section Code`[i], '-')[[1]][2], '\\.')[[1]][1]) == 2 ~ substr(booksSpring24$`Section Code`[i], 8, 9)
  )
}
  booksSpring24 <- booksSpring24 |>
  mutate(Semester = 'Spring 2024') |>
  select(`Academic Term`, `Academic Department Name`, `Course Code`, `Instructor Name`, `ISBN`, `Short Title`, `Book Author`, `Book Publisher`, `Enrollment Capacity`, `TextbookMatchISBNs.MMS Id`, `Access_Type`, `results.Availability`, `Permalink`, `Section Code`, `Subject Area`, Semester)

colnames(booksSpring24) <- c('Academic Term', 'Academic Department Name', 'Course Code', 'Instructor Name', 'ISBN', 'Short Title', 'Book Author', 'Book Publisher', 'Enrollment Capacity', 'MMS ID', 'Access_Type', 'Electronic Availability', 'Permalink', 'Section Code', 'Subject Area', 'Semester')

booksFall24 <- read_excel('Final Fall 2024 Bookstore List Oct 16.xlsx')

for(i in 1:dim(booksFall24)[1]){
  booksFall24$`Course Code`[i] <- case_when(
    nchar(str_split(str_split(booksFall24$`Section Code`[i], '-')[[1]][2], '\\.')[[1]][1]) == 4 ~ substr(booksFall24$`Section Code`[i], 8, 15),
    nchar(str_split(str_split(booksFall24$`Section Code`[i], '-')[[1]][2], '\\.')[[1]][1]) == 3 ~ substr(booksFall24$`Section Code`[i], 8, 14),
    nchar(str_split(str_split(booksFall24$`Section Code`[i], '-')[[1]][2], '\\.')[[1]][1]) == 2 ~ substr(booksFall24$`Section Code`[i], 8, 13)
  )
  
  booksFall24$`Subject Area`[i] <- case_when(
    nchar(str_split(str_split(booksFall24$`Section Code`[i], '-')[[1]][2], '\\.')[[1]][1]) == 4 ~ substr(booksFall24$`Section Code`[i], 8, 11),
    nchar(str_split(str_split(booksFall24$`Section Code`[i], '-')[[1]][2], '\\.')[[1]][1]) == 3 ~ substr(booksFall24$`Section Code`[i], 8, 10),
    nchar(str_split(str_split(booksFall24$`Section Code`[i], '-')[[1]][2], '\\.')[[1]][1]) == 2 ~ substr(booksFall24$`Section Code`[i], 8, 9)
  )
}

booksFall24 <- booksFall24 |>
  mutate(Semester = 'Fall 2024') |>
  select(`Academic Term`, `Academic Department Name`, `Course Code`, `Instructor Name`, `ISBN`, `Short Title`, `Book Author`, `Book Publisher`, `Enrollment Capacity`, `TextbookMatchISBNs.MMS Id`, `Access_Type`, `results.Availability`, `Permalink`, `Section Code`, `Subject Area`, Semester)

colnames(booksFall24) <- c('Academic Term', 'Academic Department Name', 'Course Code', 'Instructor Name', 'ISBN', 'Short Title', 'Book Author', 'Book Publisher', 'Enrollment Capacity', 'MMS ID', 'Access_Type', 'Electronic Availability', 'Permalink', 'Section Code', 'Subject Area', 'Semester')


booksSpring25 <- read_excel('Final Spring 2025 Bookstore List Mar 26.xlsx') 

for(i in 1:dim(booksSpring25)[1]){
  booksSpring25$`Course Code`[i] <- case_when(
    nchar(str_split(str_split(booksSpring25$`Section Code`[i], '-')[[1]][2], '\\.')[[1]][1]) == 4 ~ substr(booksSpring25$`Section Code`[i], 8, 15),
    nchar(str_split(str_split(booksSpring25$`Section Code`[i], '-')[[1]][2], '\\.')[[1]][1]) == 3 ~ substr(booksSpring25$`Section Code`[i], 8, 14),
    nchar(str_split(str_split(booksSpring25$`Section Code`[i], '-')[[1]][2], '\\.')[[1]][1]) == 2 ~ substr(booksSpring25$`Section Code`[i], 8, 13)
  )
  
  booksSpring25$`Subject Area`[i] <- case_when(
    nchar(str_split(str_split(booksSpring25$`Section Code`[i], '-')[[1]][2], '\\.')[[1]][1]) == 4 ~ substr(booksSpring25$`Section Code`[i], 8, 11),
    nchar(str_split(str_split(booksSpring25$`Section Code`[i], '-')[[1]][2], '\\.')[[1]][1]) == 3 ~ substr(booksSpring25$`Section Code`[i], 8, 10),
    nchar(str_split(str_split(booksSpring25$`Section Code`[i], '-')[[1]][2], '\\.')[[1]][1]) == 2 ~ substr(booksSpring25$`Section Code`[i], 8, 9)
  )
}

booksSpring25 <- booksSpring25 |>
  mutate(Semester = 'Spring 2025') |>
  select(`Academic Term`, `Academic Department Name`, `Course Code`, `Instructor Name`, `ISBN`, `Short Title`, `Book Author`, `Book Publisher`, `Enrollment Capacity`, `MMS ID`, `Access_Type`, `Electronic Availability`, `Permalink`, `Section Code`, `Subject Area`, Semester)

booksFall25 <- read_excel('Final Fall 2025 Bookstore List Sep 10.xlsx')

for(i in 1:dim(booksFall25)[1]){
  booksFall25$`Course Code`[i] <- case_when(
    nchar(str_split(str_split(booksFall25$`Section Code`[i], '-')[[1]][2], '\\.')[[1]][1]) == 4 ~ substr(booksFall25$`Section Code`[i], 8, 15),
    nchar(str_split(str_split(booksFall25$`Section Code`[i], '-')[[1]][2], '\\.')[[1]][1]) == 3 ~ substr(booksFall25$`Section Code`[i], 8, 14),
    nchar(str_split(str_split(booksFall25$`Section Code`[i], '-')[[1]][2], '\\.')[[1]][1]) == 2 ~ substr(booksFall25$`Section Code`[i], 8, 13)
  )
  
  booksFall25$`Subject Area`[i] <- case_when(
    nchar(str_split(str_split(booksFall25$`Section Code`[i], '-')[[1]][2], '\\.')[[1]][1]) == 4 ~ substr(booksFall25$`Section Code`[i], 8, 11),
    nchar(str_split(str_split(booksFall25$`Section Code`[i], '-')[[1]][2], '\\.')[[1]][1]) == 3 ~ substr(booksFall25$`Section Code`[i], 8, 10),
    nchar(str_split(str_split(booksFall25$`Section Code`[i], '-')[[1]][2], '\\.')[[1]][1]) == 2 ~ substr(booksFall25$`Section Code`[i], 8, 9)
  )
}

booksFall25 <- booksFall25 |>
  mutate(Semester = 'Fall 2025') |>
  select(`Academic Term`, `Academic Department Name`, `Course Code`, `Instructor Name`, `ISBN`, `Short Title`, `Book Author`, `Book Publisher`, `Enrollment Capacity`, `MMS ID`, `Access_Type`, `Electronic Availability`, `Permalink`, `Section Code`, `Subject Area`, Semester)



booksSpring26 <- read_excel('Final Spring 2026 Textbook List Jan 14.xlsx') 

for(i in 1:dim(booksSpring26)[1]){
  booksSpring26$`Course Code`[i] <- case_when(
    nchar(str_split(str_split(booksSpring26$`Section Code`[i], '-')[[1]][2], '\\.')[[1]][1]) == 4 ~ substr(booksSpring26$`Section Code`[i], 8, 15),
    nchar(str_split(str_split(booksSpring26$`Section Code`[i], '-')[[1]][2], '\\.')[[1]][1]) == 3 ~ substr(booksSpring26$`Section Code`[i], 8, 14),
    nchar(str_split(str_split(booksSpring26$`Section Code`[i], '-')[[1]][2], '\\.')[[1]][1]) == 2 ~ substr(booksSpring26$`Section Code`[i], 8, 13)
  )
  
  booksSpring26$`Subject Area`[i] <- case_when(
    nchar(str_split(str_split(booksSpring26$`Section Code`[i], '-')[[1]][2], '\\.')[[1]][1]) == 4 ~ substr(booksSpring26$`Section Code`[i], 8, 11),
    nchar(str_split(str_split(booksSpring26$`Section Code`[i], '-')[[1]][2], '\\.')[[1]][1]) == 3 ~ substr(booksSpring26$`Section Code`[i], 8, 10),
    nchar(str_split(str_split(booksSpring26$`Section Code`[i], '-')[[1]][2], '\\.')[[1]][1]) == 2 ~ substr(booksSpring26$`Section Code`[i], 8, 9)
  )
}

booksSpring26 <- booksSpring26 |>
  mutate(Semester = 'Spring 2026') |>
  select(`Academic Term`, `Academic Department Name`, `Course Code`, `Instructor Name`, `ISBN`, `Short Title`, `Book Author`, `Book Publisher`, `Enrollment Capacity`, `MMS ID`, `Access_Type`, `Electronic Availability`, `Permalink`, `Section Code`, `Subject Area`, Semester)



booksSummer26 <- read_excel('Final Summer 2026 Textbook List Jun 9.xlsx') 

for(i in 1:dim(booksSummer26)[1]){
  booksSummer26$`Course Code`[i] <- case_when(
    nchar(str_split(str_split(booksSummer26$`Section Code`[i], '-')[[1]][2], '\\.')[[1]][1]) == 4 ~ substr(booksSummer26$`Section Code`[i], 8, 15),
    nchar(str_split(str_split(booksSummer26$`Section Code`[i], '-')[[1]][2], '\\.')[[1]][1]) == 3 ~ substr(booksSummer26$`Section Code`[i], 8, 14),
    nchar(str_split(str_split(booksSummer26$`Section Code`[i], '-')[[1]][2], '\\.')[[1]][1]) == 2 ~ substr(booksSummer26$`Section Code`[i], 8, 13)
  )
  
  booksSummer26$`Subject Area`[i] <- case_when(
    nchar(str_split(str_split(booksSummer26$`Section Code`[i], '-')[[1]][2], '\\.')[[1]][1]) == 4 ~ substr(booksSummer26$`Section Code`[i], 8, 11),
    nchar(str_split(str_split(booksSummer26$`Section Code`[i], '-')[[1]][2], '\\.')[[1]][1]) == 3 ~ substr(booksSummer26$`Section Code`[i], 8, 10),
    nchar(str_split(str_split(booksSummer26$`Section Code`[i], '-')[[1]][2], '\\.')[[1]][1]) == 2 ~ substr(booksSummer26$`Section Code`[i], 8, 9)
  )
}

booksSummer26 <- booksSummer26 |>
  mutate(Semester = 'Summer 2026') |>
  select(`Academic Term`, `Academic Department Name`, `Course Code`, `Instructor Name`, `ISBN`, `Short Title`, `Book Author`, `Book Publisher`, `Enrollment Capacity`, `MMS ID`, `Access_Type`, `Electronic Availability`, `Permalink`, `Section Code`, `Subject Area`, Semester)


bookstoreBooks <- rbind(booksSpring24, booksFall24, booksSpring25, booksFall25, booksSpring26, booksSummer26)
```



```{r}
write_xlsx(bookstoreBooks, 'Full Bookstore List.xlsx')
```




# Request and Fulfillment Data


## Load the Textbook Tracking Sheet (for Spring 2024 - Summer 2026 Data)


Data for 2024-2025 was confirmed during December 2025. Spring 2026 data is accurate as of January 14, the date the last VolBooks list was sent.

Summer 2026 data will be incorporated later in the summer.


FOR EACH NEW SEMESTER, Download the Textbook Tracking Sheet from SharePoint to refresh it with new data, and add the semester to the filter statement below.


```{r}
textbookTrack <- read_excel('Textbook Tracking Sheet June 12.xlsx') |>
  filter(`Academic Semester` %in% c('Spring 2024', 'Fall 2024', 'Spring 2025', 'Fall 2025', 'Spring 2026', 'Summer 2026'))
```



## Load the Final Textbook Lists from VolBooks

Each list lines up with the final dates listed in the Textbook Tracking Sheet. This is the list of all titles VolBooks sends us each semester.


FOR EACH SEMESTER, copy a code chunk and rename all variables to match the current semester.


```{r, warning = FALSE}
finalReceivedSpring24 <- read_excel('Final Received Textbook List Spring 2024.xlsx') 

colnames(finalReceivedSpring24) <- c('Academic Term', 'Academic Department Name', 'Section Code', 'Instructor Name', 'ISBN', 'Short Title', 'Book Author', 'Book Publisher', 'Enrollment Capacity')

for(i in 1:dim(finalReceivedSpring24)[1]){
  finalReceivedSpring24$Course_Name[i] <- str_split(finalReceivedSpring24$`Section Code`[i], '-')[[1]][2]
  finalReceivedSpring24$Course_Number[i] <- str_split(finalReceivedSpring24$Course_Name[i], '\\.')[[1]][2]
  finalReceivedSpring24$Course_Code[i] <- substr(str_split(finalReceivedSpring24$`Section Code`[i], '-')[[1]][2], 1, nchar(str_split(finalReceivedSpring24$`Section Code`[i], '-')[[1]][2]) - 4)
}  

finalReceivedSpring24 <- finalReceivedSpring24 |>
  mutate(Course_Number = as.numeric(Course_Number),
         Semester = 'Spring 2024')


finalReceivedFall24 <- read_excel('Final Received Textbook List Fall 2024.xlsx')

for(i in 1:dim(finalReceivedFall24)[1]){
  finalReceivedFall24$Course_Name[i] <- str_split(finalReceivedFall24$`Section Code`[i], '-')[[1]][2]
  finalReceivedFall24$Course_Number[i] <- str_split(finalReceivedFall24$Course_Name[i], '\\.')[[1]][2]
  finalReceivedFall24$Course_Code[i] <- substr(str_split(finalReceivedFall24$`Section Code`[i], '-')[[1]][2], 1, nchar(str_split(finalReceivedFall24$`Section Code`[i], '-')[[1]][2]) - 4)
}  

finalReceivedFall24 <- finalReceivedFall24 |>
  mutate(Course_Number = as.numeric(Course_Number),
         Semester = 'Fall 2024')


finalReceivedSpring25 <- read_excel('Final Received Textbook List Spring 2025.xlsx')


for(i in 1:dim(finalReceivedSpring25)[1]){
  finalReceivedSpring25$Course_Name[i] <- str_split(finalReceivedSpring25$`Section Code`[i], '-')[[1]][2]
  finalReceivedSpring25$Course_Number[i] <- str_split(finalReceivedSpring25$Course_Name[i], '\\.')[[1]][2]
  finalReceivedSpring25$Course_Code[i] <- substr(str_split(finalReceivedSpring25$`Section Code`[i], '-')[[1]][2], 1, nchar(str_split(finalReceivedSpring25$`Section Code`[i], '-')[[1]][2]) - 4)
}  

finalReceivedSpring25 <- finalReceivedSpring25 |>
  mutate(Course_Number = as.numeric(Course_Number),
         Semester = 'Spring 2025')


finalReceivedFall25 <- read_excel('Final Received Textbook List Fall 2025.xlsx')

for(i in 1:dim(finalReceivedFall25)[1]){
  finalReceivedFall25$Course_Name[i] <- str_split(finalReceivedFall25$`Section Code`[i], '-')[[1]][2]
  finalReceivedFall25$Course_Number[i] <- str_split(finalReceivedFall25$Course_Name[i], '\\.')[[1]][2]
  finalReceivedFall25$Course_Code[i] <- substr(str_split(finalReceivedFall25$`Section Code`[i], '-')[[1]][2], 1, nchar(str_split(finalReceivedFall25$`Section Code`[i], '-')[[1]][2]) - 4)
}  

finalReceivedFall25 <- finalReceivedFall25 |>
  mutate(Course_Number = as.numeric(Course_Number),
         Semester = 'Fall 2025')


finalReceivedSpring26 <- read_excel('Final Received Textbook List Spring 2026.xlsx')


for(i in 1:dim(finalReceivedSpring26)[1]){
  finalReceivedSpring26$Course_Name[i] <- str_split(finalReceivedSpring26$`Section Code`[i], '-')[[1]][2]
  finalReceivedSpring26$Course_Number[i] <- str_split(finalReceivedSpring26$Course_Name[i], '\\.')[[1]][2]
  finalReceivedSpring26$Course_Code[i] <- substr(str_split(finalReceivedSpring26$`Section Code`[i], '-')[[1]][2], 1, nchar(str_split(finalReceivedSpring26$`Section Code`[i], '-')[[1]][2]) - 4)
}  

finalReceivedSpring26 <- finalReceivedSpring26 |>
  mutate(Course_Number = as.numeric(Course_Number),
         Semester = 'Spring 2026')


finalReceivedSummer26 <- read_excel('Final Received Textbook List Summer 2026.xlsx')


for(i in 1:dim(finalReceivedSummer26)[1]){
  finalReceivedSummer26$Course_Name[i] <- str_split(finalReceivedSummer26$`Section Code`[i], '-')[[1]][2]
  finalReceivedSummer26$Course_Number[i] <- str_split(finalReceivedSummer26$Course_Name[i], '\\.')[[1]][2]
  finalReceivedSummer26$Course_Code[i] <- substr(str_split(finalReceivedSummer26$`Section Code`[i], '-')[[1]][2], 1, nchar(str_split(finalReceivedSummer26$`Section Code`[i], '-')[[1]][2]) - 4)
}  

finalReceivedSummer26 <- finalReceivedSummer26 |>
  mutate(Course_Number = as.numeric(Course_Number),
         Semester = 'Summer 2026')

finalReceivedLists <- rbind(finalReceivedSpring24, finalReceivedFall24, finalReceivedSpring25, finalReceivedFall25, finalReceivedSpring26, finalReceivedSummer26) |>
  mutate(CourseA = ifelse(Course_Number >= 100 & Course_Number <= 299, 1, 0),
         CourseB = ifelse(Course_Number >= 300 & Course_Number <= 499, 1, 0),
         CourseC = ifelse(Course_Number >= 500, 1, 0))
```




# Connect the Received Lists to the Sent Lists

This will allow us to get the metrics for both fulfillment and requests in the same table.

```{r}
bookstoreSmall <- bookstoreBooks |>
  mutate(Fulfilled = 1) |>
  select(ISBN, Semester, Fulfilled, `Section Code`)

allVolBooks <- left_join(finalReceivedLists, bookstoreSmall, by = c('ISBN', 'Semester', 'Section Code')) |>
  mutate(Fulfilled = ifelse(is.na(Fulfilled) == FALSE, 1, 0))

allVolBooks
```





## Get Course Details from Banner

This tells us whether the course was a class, lab, lecture, etc. and where the class took place (in person, online synchronous or asynchronous, etc.).

FOR EACH SEMESTER, download the HTML course information from Banner. Copy a code chunk and add it to this section.


```{r, warning = FALSE}
# Spring 2024
bannerSpring2024 <- read_html('Class Schedule Listing Spring 2024.html') %>%
  html_nodes('body')

bannerTableSpring2024 <- html_table(bannerSpring2024[[1]], fill = TRUE)

sectionName = c()
sectionType = c()
sectionTime = c()
sectionDates = c()
sectionWhere = c()
sectionInstructors = c()

for(i in 1:dim(bannerTableSpring2024[1])){
  if(str_detect(bannerTableSpring2024$X1[i], ' - \\d\\d\\d\\d\\d - ') == TRUE){ #Section Code Info
    sectionName <- append(sectionName, bannerTableSpring2024$X1[i])
  }
  if(bannerTableSpring2024$X1[i] == 'Type'){ #Identifies the start of Section Details
    sectionType <- append(sectionType, bannerTableSpring2024$X1[i + 1])
    sectionTime <- append(sectionTime, bannerTableSpring2024$X2[i + 1])
    sectionDates <- append(sectionDates, bannerTableSpring2024$X5[i + 1])
    sectionWhere <- append(sectionWhere, bannerTableSpring2024$X4[i + 1])
    sectionInstructors <- append(sectionInstructors, bannerTableSpring2024$X7[i + 1])
  }
}

courseInfoSpring2024 <- data.frame(cbind(sectionName, sectionType, sectionTime, sectionDates, sectionWhere, sectionInstructors)) |>
  mutate(Semester = 'Spring 2024')

# Fall 2024
bannerFall2024 <- read_html('Class Schedule Listing Fall 2024.html') %>%
  html_nodes('body')

bannerTableFall2024 <- html_table(bannerFall2024[[1]], fill = TRUE)

sectionName = c()
sectionType = c()
sectionTime = c()
sectionDates = c()
sectionWhere = c()
sectionInstructors = c()

for(i in 1:dim(bannerTableFall2024[1])){
  if(str_detect(bannerTableFall2024$X1[i], ' - \\d\\d\\d\\d\\d - ') == TRUE){ #Section Code Info
    sectionName <- append(sectionName, bannerTableFall2024$X1[i])
  }
  if(bannerTableFall2024$X1[i] == 'Type'){ #Identifies the start of Section Details
    sectionType <- append(sectionType, bannerTableFall2024$X1[i + 1])
    sectionTime <- append(sectionTime, bannerTableFall2024$X2[i + 1])
    sectionDates <- append(sectionDates, bannerTableFall2024$X5[i + 1])
    sectionWhere <- append(sectionWhere, bannerTableFall2024$X4[i + 1])
    sectionInstructors <- append(sectionInstructors, bannerTableFall2024$X7[i + 1])
  }
}

courseInfoFall2024 <- data.frame(cbind(sectionName, sectionType, sectionTime, sectionDates, sectionWhere, sectionInstructors)) |>
  mutate(Semester = 'Fall 2024') 


# Spring 2025
bannerSpring2025 <- read_html('Class Schedule Listing Spring 2025.html') %>%
  html_nodes('body')

bannerTableSpring2025 <- html_table(bannerSpring2025[[1]], fill = TRUE)

sectionName = c()
sectionType = c()
sectionTime = c()
sectionDates = c()
sectionWhere = c()
sectionInstructors = c()

for(i in 1:dim(bannerTableSpring2025[1])){
  if(str_detect(bannerTableSpring2025$X1[i], ' - \\d\\d\\d\\d\\d - ') == TRUE){ #Section Code Info
    sectionName <- append(sectionName, bannerTableSpring2025$X1[i])
  }
  if(bannerTableSpring2025$X1[i] == 'Type'){ #Identifies the start of Section Details
    sectionType <- append(sectionType, bannerTableSpring2025$X1[i + 1])
    sectionTime <- append(sectionTime, bannerTableSpring2025$X2[i + 1])
    sectionDates <- append(sectionDates, bannerTableSpring2025$X5[i + 1])
    sectionWhere <- append(sectionWhere, bannerTableSpring2025$X4[i + 1])
    sectionInstructors <- append(sectionInstructors, bannerTableSpring2025$X7[i + 1])
  }
}

courseInfoSpring2025 <- data.frame(cbind(sectionName, sectionType, sectionTime, sectionDates, sectionWhere, sectionInstructors)) |>
  mutate(Semester = 'Spring 2025')


# Fall 2025
bannerFall2025 <- read_html('Class Schedule Listing Fall 2025.html') %>%
  html_nodes('body')

bannerTableFall2025 <- html_table(bannerFall2025[[1]], fill = TRUE)

sectionName = c()
sectionType = c()
sectionTime = c()
sectionDates = c()
sectionWhere = c()
sectionInstructors = c()

for(i in 1:dim(bannerTableFall2025[1])){
  if(str_detect(bannerTableFall2025$X1[i], ' - \\d\\d\\d\\d\\d - ') == TRUE){ #Section Code Info
    sectionName <- append(sectionName, bannerTableFall2025$X1[i])
  }
  if(bannerTableFall2025$X1[i] == 'Type'){ #Identifies the start of Section Details
    sectionType <- append(sectionType, bannerTableFall2025$X1[i + 1])
    sectionTime <- append(sectionTime, bannerTableFall2025$X2[i + 1])
    sectionDates <- append(sectionDates, bannerTableFall2025$X5[i + 1])
    sectionWhere <- append(sectionWhere, bannerTableFall2025$X4[i + 1])
    sectionInstructors <- append(sectionInstructors, bannerTableFall2025$X7[i + 1])
  }
}

courseInfoFall2025 <- data.frame(cbind(sectionName, sectionType, sectionTime, sectionDates, sectionWhere, sectionInstructors)) |>
  mutate(Semester = 'Fall 2025') 


# Spring 2026
bannerSpring2026 <- read_html('Class Schedule Listing Spring 2026.html') %>%
  html_nodes('body')

bannerTableSpring2026 <- html_table(bannerSpring2026[[1]], fill = TRUE)

sectionName = c()
sectionType = c()
sectionTime = c()
sectionDates = c()
sectionWhere = c()
sectionInstructors = c()

for(i in 1:dim(bannerTableSpring2026[1])){
  if(str_detect(bannerTableSpring2026$X1[i], ' - \\d\\d\\d\\d\\d - ') == TRUE){ #Section Code Info
    sectionName <- append(sectionName, bannerTableSpring2026$X1[i])
  }
  if(bannerTableSpring2026$X1[i] == 'Type'){ #Identifies the start of Section Details
    sectionType <- append(sectionType, bannerTableSpring2026$X1[i + 1])
    sectionTime <- append(sectionTime, bannerTableSpring2026$X2[i + 1])
    sectionDates <- append(sectionDates, bannerTableSpring2026$X5[i + 1])
    sectionWhere <- append(sectionWhere, bannerTableSpring2026$X4[i + 1])
    sectionInstructors <- append(sectionInstructors, bannerTableSpring2026$X7[i + 1])
  }
}

courseInfoSpring2026 <- data.frame(cbind(sectionName, sectionType, sectionTime, sectionDates, sectionWhere, sectionInstructors)) |>
  mutate(Semester = 'Spring 2026') 




# Summer Mini 2026
bannerSummerMini2026 <- read_html('Class Schedule Listing Summer Mini 2026.html') %>%
  html_nodes('body')

bannerTableSummerMini2026 <- html_table(bannerSummerMini2026[[1]], fill = TRUE)

sectionName = c()
sectionType = c()
sectionTime = c()
sectionDates = c()
sectionWhere = c()
sectionInstructors = c()

for(i in 1:dim(bannerTableSummerMini2026[1])){
  if(str_detect(bannerTableSummerMini2026$X1[i], ' - \\d\\d\\d\\d\\d - ') == TRUE){ #Section Code Info
    sectionName <- append(sectionName, bannerTableSummerMini2026$X1[i])
  }
  if(bannerTableSummerMini2026$X1[i] == 'Type'){ #Identifies the start of Section Details
    sectionType <- append(sectionType, bannerTableSummerMini2026$X1[i + 1])
    sectionTime <- append(sectionTime, bannerTableSummerMini2026$X2[i + 1])
    sectionDates <- append(sectionDates, bannerTableSummerMini2026$X5[i + 1])
    sectionWhere <- append(sectionWhere, bannerTableSummerMini2026$X4[i + 1])
    sectionInstructors <- append(sectionInstructors, bannerTableSummerMini2026$X7[i + 1])
  }
}

courseInfoSummerMini2026 <- data.frame(cbind(sectionName, sectionType, sectionTime, sectionDates, sectionWhere, sectionInstructors)) |>
  mutate(Semester = 'Summer Mini 2026') 




# Summer Full 2026
bannerSummerFull2026 <- read_html('Class Schedule Listing Summer Full 2026.html') %>%
  html_nodes('body')

bannerTableSummerFull2026 <- html_table(bannerSummerFull2026[[1]], fill = TRUE)

sectionName = c()
sectionType = c()
sectionTime = c()
sectionDates = c()
sectionWhere = c()
sectionInstructors = c()

for(i in 1:dim(bannerTableSummerFull2026[1])){
  if(str_detect(bannerTableSummerFull2026$X1[i], ' - \\d\\d\\d\\d\\d - ') == TRUE){ #Section Code Info
    sectionName <- append(sectionName, bannerTableSummerFull2026$X1[i])
  }
  if(bannerTableSummerFull2026$X1[i] == 'Type'){ #Identifies the start of Section Details
    sectionType <- append(sectionType, bannerTableSummerFull2026$X1[i + 1])
    sectionTime <- append(sectionTime, bannerTableSummerFull2026$X2[i + 1])
    sectionDates <- append(sectionDates, bannerTableSummerFull2026$X5[i + 1])
    sectionWhere <- append(sectionWhere, bannerTableSummerFull2026$X4[i + 1])
    sectionInstructors <- append(sectionInstructors, bannerTableSummerFull2026$X7[i + 1])
  }
}

courseInfoSummerFull2026 <- data.frame(cbind(sectionName, sectionType, sectionTime, sectionDates, sectionWhere, sectionInstructors)) |>
  mutate(Semester = 'Summer Full 2026') 


courseInfo <- rbind(courseInfoSpring2024, courseInfoFall2024, courseInfoSpring2025, courseInfoFall2025, courseInfoSpring2026, courseInfoSummerMini2026, courseInfoSummerFull2026)

courseInfo
```




## Join Banner Details to the VolBooks Details

The section code will need to be created from the section name for proper matching.


```{r}
sectionInfo <- courseInfo 

for(i in 1:dim(sectionInfo)[1]){
    sectionInfo$sectionCode[i] <- str_trim(paste(
    substr(sectionInfo$Semester[i], nchar(sectionInfo$Semester[i]) - 4, nchar(sectionInfo$Semester[i])),
    case_when(
      grepl('Spring', sectionInfo$Semester[i]) == TRUE ~ 20,
      grepl('Summer', sectionInfo$Semester[i]) == TRUE ~ 30,
      grepl('Fall', sectionInfo$Semester[i]) == TRUE ~ 40
    ),
    '-',
    str_split(str_split(sectionInfo$sectionName[i], '- ')[[1]][3], ' ')[[1]][1],
    '.',
    str_split(str_split(sectionInfo$sectionName[i], '- ')[[1]][3], ' ')[[1]][2],
    '.',
    str_split(sectionInfo$sectionName[i], '- ')[[1]][4],
    '-',
    str_trim(str_split(sectionInfo$sectionName[i], '- ')[[1]][2])
  , sep = ''))
}

sectionInfo
```




```{r}
requestAndFill <- left_join(allVolBooks, sectionInfo, by = c('Section Code' = 'sectionCode', 'Semester' = 'Semester')) |>
  mutate(Format = case_when(
    is.na(sectionWhere) == TRUE ~ 'Unknown',
    grepl('ONLINE', sectionWhere, ignore.case = TRUE) == TRUE ~ 'Online',
    grepl('ONLINE', sectionWhere, ignore.case = TRUE) == FALSE ~ 'In Person'
  ),
        sectionType = ifelse(is.na(sectionType) == TRUE, 'Unknown', sectionType),
        SortOrder = case_when(
          Semester == 'Spring 2024' ~ 1,
          Semester == 'Fall 2024' ~ 2,
          Semester == 'Spring 2025' ~ 3,
          Semester == 'Fall 2025' ~ 4,
          Semester == 'Spring 2026' ~ 5,
          Semester == 'Summer 2026' ~ 6
        ))

requestAndFill
```



```{r}
write_xlsx(requestAndFill, 'Full Course Information.xlsx')
```


## Calculate Metrics


### Directly from Textbook Tracking Sheet

The Alma-Based Metrics will be taken from the Textbook Tracking Sheet directly for every semester up to Summer 2026.

```{r}
ttsMetrics <- textbookTrack |>
  select(`Academic Semester`, `Total Titles Found in Rialto`, `Previously Owned`, `Purchased that Semester`, `Total Titles Owned`, `Total Cost`)

colnames(ttsMetrics) <- c('Semester', 'Total Titles', 'Previously Owned', 'Purchased That Semester', 'Total Owned', 'Total Cost')

ttsMetrics
```



### Based on VolBooks-Sent Lists Only

These metrics come from aggregating information from the list of titles sent from VolBooks only. The combined file including requests and fulfilled data will be used for consistency.


```{r}
volListMetrics <- requestAndFill |>
  group_by(Semester) |>
  summarise(TotalTitlesRequested = length(unique(`Short Title`)),
            DepartmentsParticipating = length(unique(`Academic Department Name`)),
            UniqueCourses = length(unique(paste(`Academic Department Name`, Course_Number)))
            )

volListMetrics
```



### Based on Unique Department or Course Information


This section uses both the VolBooks sent and received lists, but breaks down information by unique department or course to get those figures.



```{r}
departmentBreakdown <- requestAndFill |>
  group_by(Semester, `Academic Department Name`) |>
  summarise(TotalDepartmentRequests = length(unique(`Short Title`)),
            TotalDepartmentCourses = length(unique(paste(`Academic Department Name`, Course_Number))))

departmentBreakdown
```



## Information For Each Course

This will be for the course count metrics, using the same requestAndFill data.


```{r}
courseBreakdown <- requestAndFill |>
  mutate(CourseClean = paste(`Academic Department Name`, `Course_Number`)) |>
  group_by(Semester, CourseClean) |>
  summarise(Sections = length(unique(Course_Name)),
            TitlesRequested = length(unique(`Short Title`)),
            Is100 = max(CourseA),
            Is300 = max(CourseB),
            Is500 = max(CourseC),
            HasBookFulfilled = max(Fulfilled)
  )
            

courseBreakdown
```



```{r}
semesterByCourse <- courseBreakdown |>
  group_by(Semester) |>
  summarise(FulfilledCourses = sum(HasBookFulfilled),
            Courses100 = sum(Is100),
            Courses100Fulfilled = sum(ifelse(Is100 + HasBookFulfilled == 2, 1, 0)),
            Courses300 = sum(Is300),
            Courses300Fulfilled = sum(ifelse(Is300 + HasBookFulfilled == 2, 1, 0)),
            Courses500 = sum(Is500),
            Courses500Fulfilled = sum(ifelse(Is500 + HasBookFulfilled == 2, 1, 0)))

semesterByCourse
```



### Join All Semester-Wide Metrics Together and Add Percentages

All of the above created metrics for each semester will be joined by semester. The department metrics will remain separate within the final report.


```{r}
joinA <- inner_join(ttsMetrics, volListMetrics, by = 'Semester')
joinB <- inner_join(joinA, semesterByCourse, by = 'Semester')  |>
  mutate(PercentTitlesOwned = round(100.0*(`Total Owned` / TotalTitlesRequested), 1))

```

## Export the Department and Course Tracking Files


The Semester will be exported later in the code, after usage is added.

```{r}
write_xlsx(departmentBreakdown, 'VolBooks Textbook Tracking by Department.xlsx')
write_xlsx(courseBreakdown, 'VolBooks Textbook Tracking by Course.xlsx')
```


Both of these files will go to the PowerBI report.



# Usage Gathering



## Clean up the Full Bookstore List


```{r}
bookstoreCourses <- bookstoreBooks |>
  select(`Subject Area`, Semester) |>
  distinct()

bookstoreCourses


bookstoreList <- bookstoreBooks |>
  select(ISBN, `Short Title`, `Book Author`, `Book Publisher`, `MMS ID`, `Electronic Availability`, Semester) |>
  distinct() |>
  mutate(`MMS ID` = as.character(`MMS ID`)) |>
  mutate(`MMS ID` = paste(substr(`MMS ID`, 1, 15), '1', sep = '')) 

bookstoreList
```




## Insert Clean Titles for Title Matching


FOR EACH SEMESTER, check the names of the new books sent to VolBooks in the usage database, PowerBI dashboard, or other usage methods. Make sure each title name is edited to MATCH THE USAGE NAME FOR THE TITLE by adding additional lines to the function below.

```{r}
bookstoreListShort <- bookstoreList |>
  mutate(UsageTitle = case_when(
    #Usage Found Titles Go in This Block
    
    `Short Title` == '58-IN-MIND : MULTILINGUAL TEACHING STRATEGIES FOR DIVERSE DEAF STUDENTS' ~ '58-IN-MIND',
    `Short Title` == 'A DOCUMENTARY HISTORY OF RELIGION IN AMERICA' ~ 'A Documentary History of Religion in America',
    `Short Title` == 'A FIELD GUIDE TO GRAD SCHOOL' ~ 'A Field Guide to Grad School',
    `Short Title` == 'A HOUSE FOR MR. BISWAS' ~ 'A House for Mr. Biswas',
    `Short Title` == 'A SHORT COURSE IN READING FRENCH' ~ 'A Short Course in Reading French',
    `Short Title` == 'A TALE OF TWO CULTURES : QUALITATIVE AND QUANTITATIVE RESEARCH IN THE SOCIAL SCIENCES' ~ 'A Tale of Two Cultures',
    `Short Title` == "A WRITER'S DIARY : THE VIRGINIA WOOLF LIBRARY AUTHORIZED EDITION" ~ "A Writer's Diary",
    `Short Title` == 'ACADEMY OF NUTRITION AND DIETETICS POCKET GUIDE TO NUTRITION ASSESSMENT' ~ 'Academy of Nutrition & Dietetics Pocket Guide to Nutrition Assessment',
    `Short Title` == 'ACT MADE SIMPLE : AN EASY-TO-READ PRIMER ON ACCEPTANCE AND COMMITMENT THERAPY' ~ 'ACT Made Simple',
    `Short Title` == 'AFFRILACHIA (OLD COVE PRESS)' ~ 'Affrilachia: Poems',
    `Short Title` == 'AFRICAN SLAVERY IN LATIN AMERICA & THE CARIBBEAN' ~ 'African Slavery in Latin America and the Caribbean',
    `Short Title` == 'AFTER VICTORY : INSTITUTIONS, STRATEGIC RESTRAINT, AND THE REBUILDING OF ORDER AFTER MAJOR WARS' ~ 'After Victory',
    `Short Title` == "ALL THAT SHE CARRIED : THE JOURNEY OF ASHLEY'S SACK, A BLACK FAMILY KEEPSAKE" ~ 'All That She Carried',
    `Short Title` == 'AMERICA AND THE GREAT WAR : 1914 - 1920' ~ 'America and the Great War',
    `Short Title` == 'AMERICAN MILITARY LIFE IN THE 21ST CENTURY : SOCIAL, CULTURAL, AND ECONOMIC ISSUES AND TRENDS [2 VOLUMES]' ~ 'American Military Life in the 21st Century: Social, Cultural, and Economic Issues and Trends [2 Volumes]',
    `Short Title` == 'AN INTRO TO SCIENTIFIC COMPUTING (FREE DIGITAL ACCESS UTK LIBRARY)' ~ 'An Introduction to Scientific Computing',
    `Short Title` == 'AN UNKINDNESS OF GHOSTS' ~ 'An Unkindness of Ghosts',
    `Short Title` == 'AN UNSEEN LIGHT : BLACK STRUGGLES FOR FREEDOM IN MEMPHIS, TENNESSEE' ~ 'An Unseen Light',
    `Short Title` == 'ANGER : THE CONFLICTED HISTORY OF AN EMOTION' ~ 'Anger',
    `Short Title` == 'APPEALS IN MODERN RHETORIC' ~ 'Appeals in Modern Rhetoric',
    `Short Title` == 'APPLIED ARTIFICIAL INTELLIGENCE IN BUSINESS : CONCEPTS AND CASES' ~ 'Applied Artificial Intelligence in Business',
    `Short Title` == 'ARRESTED JUSTICE W/LIFETIME ACCESS' ~ 'Arrested Justice',
    `Short Title` == 'ARRESTED JUSTICE W/LIFETIME ACCESS (FREE DIGITAL ACCESS- UTK LIBRARY)' ~ 'Arrested Justice',
    `Short Title` == 'ASSESSMENT IN COUNSELING : PROCEDURES AND PRACTICES' ~ 'Assessment in Counseling: Procedures and Practices',
    `Short Title` == 'ASSESSMENT IN STUDENT AFFAIRS' ~ 'Assessment in Student Affairs',
    `Short Title` == 'BANANAS' ~ 'Bananas',
    `Short Title` == 'BANKING ON FREEDOM' ~ 'Banking on Freedom',
    `Short Title` == 'BESTIARY : BEING AN ENGLISH VERSION OF THE BODLEIAN LIBRARY, OXFORD, MS BODLEY 764' ~ 'Bestiary: Being an English Version of the Bodleian Library, Oxford M.S. Bodley 764 : With All the Original Miniatures Reproduced in Facsimile',
    `Short Title` == 'BIOETHICS : WHAT EVERYONE NEEDS TO KNOW?' ~ 'Bioethics: What Everyone Needs to Know',
    `Short Title` == 'BIOMATERIALS SCIENCE : AN INTRODUCTION TO MATERIALS IN MEDICINE' ~ 'Biomaterials Science',
    `Short Title` == 'BIOMECHANICS OF MOVEMENT : THE SCIENCE OF SPORTS, ROBOTICS, AND REHABILITATION' ~ 'Biomechanics of Movement',
    `Short Title` == 'BOATS OF THE WORLD : FROM THE STONE AGE TO MEDIEVAL TIMES' ~ 'Boats of the World',
    `Short Title` == 'BRAIDING SWEETGRASS : INDIGENOUS WISDOM, SCIENTIFIC KNOWLEDGE AND THE TEACHINGS OF PLANTS' ~ 'Braiding Sweetgrass',
    `Short Title` == 'BUDGETS & FINANCIAL MGT IN HIGHER ED' ~ 'Budgets and Financial Management in Higher Education',
    `Short Title` == 'BUILDING SMALL : A TOOLKIT FOR REAL ESTATE ENTREPRENEURS, CIVIC LEADERS, AND GREAT COMMUNITIES' ~ 'Building Small',
    `Short Title` == 'CASE STUDIES IN DEAF EDUCATION : INQUIRY, APPLICATION, AND RESOURCES' ~ 'Case Studies in Deaf Education',
    `Short Title` == 'CATALOG OF UNABASHED GRATITUDE' ~ 'Catalog of Unabashed Gratitude',
    `Short Title` == 'CEREMONY' ~ 'Ceremony',
    `Short Title` == 'CHASTE PASSIONS : MEDIEVAL ENGLISH VIRGIN MARTYR LEGENDS' ~ 'Chaste Passions',
    `Short Title` == 'CHIEF SUSTAINABILITY OFFICERS AT WORK' ~ 'Chief Sustainability Officers At Work',
    `Short Title` == 'CHIEF SUSTAINABILITY OFFICERS AT WORK (FREE DIGITAL- UTK LIBRARY)' ~ 'Chief Sustainability Officers At Work',
    `Short Title` == 'CHIEF SUSTAINABILITY OFFICERS AT WORK : HOW CSOS BUILD BUSINESS GROWTH THROUGH SUSTAINABLE STRATEGIES' ~ 'Chief Sustainability Officers At Work',
    `Short Title` == 'CHILD-CENTERED PLAY THERAPY' ~ 'Child-Centered Play Therapy',
    `Short Title` == 'CLASSICAL NUMERICAL ANALYSIS' ~ 'Classical Numerical Analysis',
    `Short Title` == 'COLLECTED BODY' ~ 'Collected Body',
    `Short Title` == 'COMPUTER SECURITY AND THE INTERNET' ~ 'Computer Security and the Internet',
    `Short Title` == 'CONCISE GUIDE TO CHILD AND ADOLESCENT PSYCHIATRY' ~ 'Concise Guide to Child and Adolescent Psychiatry',
    `Short Title` == 'CONDENSED MATTER PHYSICS' ~ 'Condensed Matter Physics, Second Edition',
    `Short Title` == 'CONFLICT RESOLUTION FOR THE HELPING PROFESSIONSUSTICE' ~ 'Conflict Resolution for the Helping Professions',
    `Short Title` == 'CONSERVATION BIOLOGY : FOUNDATIONS, CONCEPTS, APPLICATIONS' ~ 'Conservation Biology',
    `Short Title` == 'CONTROVERSIES IN CONTEMPORARY ADVERTISING' ~ 'Controversies in Contemporary Advertising',
    `Short Title` == 'COPAGANDA : HOW POLICE AND THE MEDIA MANIPULATE OUR NEWS' ~ 'Copaganda',
    `Short Title` == 'CORE COMPETENCIES IN COGNITIVE-BEHAVIORAL THERAPY' ~ 'Core Competencies in Cognitive-Behavioral Therapy',
    `Short Title` == 'CORE VALUES IN SCHOOL LIBRARIANSHIP: RESPONDING WITH COMMITMENT AND COURAGE' ~ 'Core Values in School Librarianship',
    `Short Title` == 'COURSE IN MATHEMATICAL MODELING' ~ 'A Course in Mathematical Modeling',
    `Short Title` == 'CRACK : ROCK COCAINE, STREET CAPITALISM, AND THE DECADE OF GREED' ~ 'Crack',
    `Short Title` == 'CRACKED NOT BROKEN' ~ 'Cracked, Not Broken',
    `Short Title` == 'CRAFTING THE PERSONAL ESSAY : A GUIDE FOR WRITING AND PUBLISHING CREATIVE NON-FICTION' ~ 'Crafting The Personal Essay',
    `Short Title` == 'CURVES AND SURFACES : SECOND EDITION' ~ 'Curves and Surfaces',
    `Short Title` == 'DEAF CULTURE : EXPLORING DEAF COMMUNITIES IN THE UNITED STATES' ~ 'Deaf Culture',
    `Short Title` == 'DEAF PEOPLE AND SOCIETY : PSYCHOLOGICAL, SOCIOLOGICAL, AND EDUCATIONAL PERSPECTIVES' ~ 'Deaf People and Society',
    `Short Title` == 'DEBATING REFORM : CONFLICTING PERSPECTIVES ON HOW TO FIX THE AMERICAN POLITICAL SYSTEM' ~ 'Debating Reform : Conflicting Perspectives on How to Fix the American Political System',
    `Short Title` == 'DEBATING REFORM: CONFLICTING PERSPECTIVES' ~ 'Debating Reform : Conflicting Perspectives on How to Fix the American Political System',
    `Short Title` == 'DEFI AND THE FUTURE OF FINANCE' ~ 'DeFi and the Future of Finance',
    `Short Title` == 'DEMAND AND SUPPLY INTEGRATION : THE KEY TO WORLD-CLASS DEMAND FORECASTING, SECOND EDITION' ~ 'Demand and Supply Integration',
    `Short Title` == 'DESIGN STRATEGY : CHALLENGES IN WICKED PROBLEM TERRITORY' ~ 'Design Strategy',
    `Short Title` == 'DESIGNS FOR LIVING AND LEARNING, SECOND EDITION : TRANSFORMING EARLY CHILDHOOD ENVIRONMENTS' ~ 'Designs for Living and Learning, Second Edition',
    `Short Title` == 'DIFFERENTIAL EQUATIONS, DYNAMICAL SYSTEMS, AND AN INTRODUCTION TO CHAOS' ~ 'Differential Equations, Dynamical Systems, and an Introduction to Chaos (Third Edition)',
    `Short Title` == 'DIFFERENTIAL GEOMETRY : CURVES - SURFACES - MANIFOLDS' ~ 'Differential Geometry: Manifolds, Curves, and Surfaces',
    `Short Title` == 'DIRECTING : FILM TECHNIQUES AND AESTHETICS' ~ 'Directing',
    `Short Title` == 'DUST BOWLS OF EMPIRE : IMPERIALISM, ENVIRONMENTAL POLITICS,' ~ 'Dust Bowls of Empire',
    `Short Title` == 'ECONOMETRIC ANALY OF CROSS SECT & P' ~ 'Econometric Analysis of Cross Section and Panel Data, Second Edition',
    `Short Title` == 'ELEMENTS OF ENVIRONMENTAL CHEMISTRY' ~ 'Elements of Environmental Chemistry, Second Edition',
    `Short Title` == 'EMPIRE OF RELIGION' ~ 'Empire of Religion: Imperialism and Comparative Religion',
    `Short Title` == 'ENGAGED ANTHROPOLOGY : POLITICS BEYOND THE TEXT' ~ 'Engaged Anthropology',
    `Short Title` == 'ENVIROMEDICS : THE IMPACT OF CLIMATE CHANGE ON HUMAN HEALTH' ~ 'Enviromedics',
    `Short Title` == 'ESSENTIALS OF ASSESSMENT REPORT WRITING' ~ 'Essentials of Assessment Report Writing',
    `Short Title` == 'ESSENTIALS OF FOOD SCIENCE' ~ 'Essentials of Food Science',
    `Short Title` == 'ETHICS FOR BEHAVIOR ANALYSTS' ~ 'Ethics for Behavior Analysts',
    `Short Title` == 'EUCLIDEAN GEOMETRY : A GUIDED INQUIRY APPROACH' ~ 'Euclidean Geometry',
    `Short Title` == 'EVALUATION AND MEASUREMENT OF LIBRARY SERVICES' ~ 'The Evaluation and Measurement of Library Services',
    `Short Title` == 'EVELINA' ~ "Evelina: Or the History of A Young Lady's Entrance into the World",
    `Short Title` == 'EXACTLY HOW TO SELL : THE SALES GUIDE FOR NON-SALES PROFESSIONALS' ~ 'Exactly How to Sell',
    `Short Title` == 'EXPERT APPROACHES TO SPORT PSYCHOLOGY: APPLIED THEORIES OF PERFORMANCE EXCELLENCE' ~ 'Expert Approaches to Sport Psychology: Applied Theories of Performance Excellence',
    `Short Title` == 'EYES BOTTLE DARK WITH A MOUTHFUL OF FLOWERS : POEMS' ~ 'Eyes Bottle Dark with a Mouthful of Flowers: Poems',
    `Short Title` == 'FATAL INVENTION : HOW SCIENCE, POLITICS, AND BIG BUSINESS RE-CREATE RACE IN THE TWENTY-FIRST CENTURY' ~ 'Fatal Invention',
    `Short Title` == 'FIGHTING AGAINST INJUSTICE OF STATE' ~ 'Fighting Against the Injustice of the State and Globalization',
    `Short Title` == 'FINANCE FOR REAL ESTATE DEVELOPMENT' ~ 'Finance for Real Estate Development',
    `Short Title` == 'FINANCIAL LITERACY FOR MANAGERS : FINANCE AND ACCOUNTING FOR BETTER DECISION-MAKING' ~ 'Financial Literacy for Managers',
    `Short Title` == 'FINANCIAL STATEMENTS' ~ 'Financial Statements',
    `Short Title` == 'FISHING THROUGH THE APOCALYPSE' ~ 'Fishing Through the Apocalypse',
    `Short Title` == 'FOREST MANAGEMENT AND PLANNING' ~ 'Forest Management and Planning',
    `Short Title` == 'FROM THE TRICONTINENTAL TO THE GLOBAL SOUTH : RACE, RADICALISM, AND TRANSNATIONAL SOLIDARITY' ~ 'From the Tricontinental to the Global South',
    `Short Title` == 'GENDER AND THE MUSICAL CANON' ~ 'Gender and the Musical Canon',
    `Short Title` == 'GENKI II' ~ 'GENKI: An Integrated Course in Elementary Japanese Ⅱ　SECOND EDITION 初級日本語 げんきⅡ 第2版',
    `Short Title` == 'GENKI II WORKBOOK' ~ 'GENKI: An Integrated Course in Elementary Japanese Ⅱ WORKBOOK　SECOND EDITION 初級日本語 げんきⅡ ワークブック　第2版',
    `Short Title` == 'GENKI: AN INTEGRATED COURSE IN ELEMENTARY JAPANESE 1 [3RD EDITION] WORKBOOK' ~ 'GENKI: An Integrated Course in Elementary Japanese Ⅰ　WORKBOOK THIRD EDITION 初級日本語 げんきⅠ ワークブック　 第3版',
    `Short Title` == 'GEOMETRIC GROUP THEORY : AN INTRODUCTION' ~ 'Geometric Group Theory',
    `Short Title` == 'GETTING REAL ABOUT INEQUALITY : INTERSECTIONALITY IN REAL LIFE' ~ 'Getting Real About Inequality: Intersectionality in Real Life',
    `Short Title` == 'GLOBAL HEALTH LAW AND POLICY : ENSURING JUSTICE FOR A HEALTHIER WORLD' ~ 'Global Health Law and Policy',
    `Short Title` == 'GLOBAL WRITING FOR PUBLIC RELATIONS : CONNECTING IN ENGLISH WITH STAKEHOLDERS AND PUBLICS WORLDWIDE' ~ 'Global Writing for Public Relations',
    `Short Title` == 'GLOBALIZATION OF EDUCATION' ~ 'Globalization of Education',
    `Short Title` == 'GOVERNMENT AND POLITICS IN TENNESSEE' ~ 'Government and Politics in Tennessee',
    `Short Title` == 'GUIDE TO THE VASCULAR PLANTS OF TENNESSEE' ~ 'Guide to the Vascular Plants of Tennessee',
    `Short Title` == 'HABLAR ESPANOL EN ESTADOS UNIDOS : LA SOCIOPOLITICA DEL LENGUAJE' ~ 'Hablar español en Estados Unidos',
    `Short Title` == 'HARP OF BURMA' ~ 'Harp of Burma',
    `Short Title` == 'HEAD OFF & SPLIT' ~ 'Head Off & Split',
    `Short Title` == 'HEY WHIPPLE, SQUEEZE THIS : THE CLASSIC GUIDE TO CREATING GREAT ADVERTISING' ~ 'Hey Whipple, Squeeze This',
    `Short Title` == 'HISTORY: A VERY SHORT INTRODUCTION' ~ 'History: A Very Short Introduction',
    `Short Title` == 'HOW GREAT LEADERS THINK : THE ART OF REFRAMING' ~ 'How Great Leaders Think', 
    `Short Title` == 'HOW TO KEEP YOUR COOL : AN ANCIENT GUIDE TO ANGER MANAGEMENT' ~ 'How to Keep Your Cool',
    `Short Title` == 'HOW TO WRITE A LOT' ~ 'How to Write a Lot: A Practical Guide to Productive Academic Writing',
    `Short Title` == 'HUMAN BIOLOGY' ~ 'Human Biology',
    `Short Title` == 'HUMAN OSTEOLOGY' ~ 'Human Osteology',
    `Short Title` == 'HUMAN RIGHTS AND SOCIAL JUSTICE IN A GLOBAL PERSPECTIVE' ~ 'Human Rights and Social Justice in a Global Perspective: An Introduction to International Social Work',
    `Short Title` == 'HUMAN RIGHTS AND SOCIAL JUSTICE IN A GLOBAL PERSPECTIVE : AN INTRODUCTION TO INTERNATIONAL SOCIAL WORK' ~ 'Human Rights and Social Justice in a Global Perspective: An Introduction to International Social Work',
    `Short Title` == 'IA:1177 B. C. : THE YEAR CIVILIZATION COLLAPSED: REVISED AND UPDATED' ~ '1177 B.C.',
    `Short Title` == 'IA:ADVANCED LINEAR ALGEBRA FOR ENGINEERS WITH MATLAB' ~ 'Advanced Linear Algebra for Engineers with MATLAB',
    `Short Title` == 'IA:APPLIED MULTIPLE REGRESS/CORR ANALY' ~ 'Applied Multiple Regression/Correlation Analysis for the Behavioral Sciences',
    `Short Title` == 'IA:BLACK ELK SPEAKS' ~ 'Black Elk Speaks',
    `Short Title` == 'IA:BUILDING THE BLACK METROPOLIS : AFRICAN AMERICAN ENTREPRENEURSHIP IN CHICAGO' ~ 'Building the Black Metropolis',
    `Short Title` == 'IA:EMBODIED AVATARS : GENEALOGIES OF BLACK FEMINIST ART AND PERFORMANCE' ~ 'Embodied Avatars',
    `Short Title` == 'IA:ETHICS FOR BEHAVIOR ANALYSTS' ~ 'Ethics for Behavior Analysts',
    `Short Title` == 'IA:FOOD POLICY IN THE UNITED STATES' ~ 'Food Policy in the United States',
    `Short Title` == 'IA:FORENSIC ANTHROPOLOGY' ~ 'Forensic Anthropology',
    `Short Title` == 'IA:GLOBALIZATION OF EDUCATION' ~ 'Globalization of Education',
    `Short Title` == 'IA:MODELS OF THE MIND' ~ 'Models of the Mind',
    `Short Title` == 'IA:NEXT STEPS : DECISION CASES FOR SOCIAL WORK PRACTICE' ~ 'Next Steps',
    `Short Title` == "IA:ORTNER'S IDENTIFICATION OF PATHOLOGICAL CONDITIONS IN HUMAN SKELETAL REMAINS" ~ "Ortner's Identification of Pathological Conditions in Human Skeletal Remains",
    `Short Title` == 'IA:PARABLE OF THE SOWER' ~ 'Parable of the Sower',
    `Short Title` == 'IA:PROBABILITY, A GRADUATE COURSE' ~ 'Probability: A Graduate Course',
    `Short Title` == 'IA:PSYCHOANALYSIS UNDER OCCUPATION : PRACTICING RESISTANCE IN PALESTINE' ~ 'Psychoanalysis Under Occupation',
    `Short Title` == 'IA:RECKONING WITH SLAVERY : GENDER, KINSHIP, AND CAPITALISM IN THE EARLY BLACK ATLANTIC' ~ 'Reckoning with Slavery',
    `Short Title` == 'IA:REGRESSION METHODS IN BIOSTATISTICS' ~ 'Regression Methods in Biostatistics',
    `Short Title` == 'IA:RESEARCH METHODS FOR SPORT MANAGEMENT' ~ 'Research Methods for Sport Management',
    `Short Title` == 'IA:SICK ENOUGH : A GUIDE TO THE MEDICAL COMPLICATIONS OF EATING DISORDERS' ~ 'Sick Enough',
    `Short Title` == 'IA:SOCRATIC QUESTIONING FOR THERAPISTS AND COUNSELORS : LEARN HOW TO THINK AND INTERVENE LIKE A COGNITIVE BEHAVIOR THERAPIST' ~ 'Socratic Questioning for Therapists and Counselors',
    `Short Title` == 'IA:STABILIZATION AND DYNAMIC OF PREMIXED SWIRLING FLAMES : PREVAPORIZED, STRATIFIED, PARTIALLY, AND FULLY PREMIXED REGIMES' ~ 'Stabilization and Dynamic of Premixed Swirling Flames',
    `Short Title` == 'IA:TRAUMA AND MENTAL HEALTH SOCIAL WORK WITH URBAN POPULATIONS' ~ 'Trauma and Mental Health Social Work With Urban Populations',
    `Short Title` == 'IA:UNDESIRABLES : A HOLOCAUST JOURNEY TO NORTH AFRICA' ~ 'Undesirables',
    `Short Title` == 'INFLUENCE WITHOUT AUTHORITY W/LIFETIME ACCESS' ~ 'Influence Without Authority',
    `Short Title` == 'INFORMATION SERVICES TODAY : AN INTRODUCTION' ~ 'Information Services Today: An Introduction',
    `Short Title` == 'INSTRUCTIONAL SUPERVISION : APPLYING TOOLS AND CONCEPTS' ~ 'Instructional Supervision',
    `Short Title` == 'INTERNATIONAL ENERGY MARKETS : UNDERSTANDING PRICING, POLICIES AND PROFITS' ~ 'International Energy Markets',
    `Short Title` == 'INTERNATIONAL TRADE AND AGRICULTURE : THEORIES AND PRACTICES' ~ 'International Trade and Agriculture',
    `Short Title` == 'INTRODUCTION TO AMERICAN DEAF CULTURE' ~ 'Introduction to American Deaf Culture',
    `Short Title` == 'INTRODUCTION TO APPLIED NONLINEAR DYNAMICAL SYSTEMS AND CHAOS' ~ 'Introduction to Applied Nonlinear Dynamical Systems and Chaos',
    `Short Title` == 'INTRODUCTION TO CRISIS AND TRAUMA COUNSELING' ~ 'Introduction to crisis and trauma counseling',
    `Short Title` == 'INTRODUCTION TO INDUSTRIAL ORGANIZATION, SECOND EDITION' ~ 'Introduction to Industrial Organization, Second Edition',
    `Short Title` == 'INTRODUCTION TO PARTIAL DIFFERENTIAL EQUATIONS' ~ 'Introduction to Partial Differential Equations',
    `Short Title` == 'INTRODUCTION TO PARTIAL DIFFERENTIAL EQUATIONS (FREE DIGITAL ACCESS- UTK LIBRARY)' ~ 'Introduction to Partial Differential Equations',
    `Short Title` == 'INTRODUCTION TO STOCHASTIC PROCESSES' ~ 'Introduction to Stochastic Processes',
    `Short Title` == 'INVASIVE SPECIES : WHAT EVERYONE NEEDS TO KNOW?' ~ 'Invasive Species',
    `Short Title` == "JACOB'S ROOM" ~ "Jacob's Room",
    `Short Title` == 'JOHNS HOPKINS EVIDENCE-BASED PRACTICE FOR NURSES AND HEALTHCARE PROFESSIONALS, FOURTH EDITION' ~ 'Johns Hopkins Evidence-Based Practice for Nurses and Healthcare Professionals, Fourth Edition',
    `Short Title` == 'JUST PRACTICE: A SOCIAL JUSTICE APPROACH TO SOCIAL WORK' ~ 'Just Practice: A Social Justice Approach to Social Work',
    `Short Title` == 'KEYWORDS IN SOUND' ~ 'Keywords in Sound',
    `Short Title` == 'LANGUAGE, TRUTH AND LOGIC' ~ 'Language, Truth and Logic',
    `Short Title` == 'LEADING WITH QUESTIONS : HOW LEADERS DISCOVER POWERFUL ANSWERS BY KNOWING HOW AND WHAT TO ASK' ~ 'Leading with Questions: How Leaders Discover Powerful Answers by Knowing How and What to Ask',
    `Short Title` == 'LEAN PRODUCTION FOR COMPETITIVE ADVANTAGE : A COMPREHENSIVE GUIDE TO LEAN METHODOLOGIES AND MANAGEMENT PRACTICES, SECOND EDITION' ~ 'Lean Production for Competitive Advantage',
    `Short Title` == 'LEARNING TO BE TEACHER LEADERS' ~ 'Learning to Be Teacher Leaders',
    `Short Title` == 'LINCOLN AND THE TRIUMPH OF THE NATION : CONSTITUTIONAL CONFLICT IN THE AMERICAN CIVIL WAR' ~ 'Lincoln and the Triumph of the Nation',
    `Short Title` == 'LINGUISTICS OF ASL: INTRO (W/DVD)' ~ 'Linguistics of American Sign Language, 5th Ed.',
    `Short Title` == 'LITERARY THEORY : AN ANTHOLOGY' ~ 'Literary Theory: An Anthology',
    `Short Title` == 'MACBETH' ~ 'Macbeth',
    `Short Title` == 'MACHINING DYNAMICS : FREQUENCY RESPONSE TO IMPROVED PRODUCTIVITY' ~ 'Machining Dynamics',
    `Short Title` == "MADAM C. J. WALKER'S GOSPEL OF GIVING : BLACK WOMEN'S PHILANTHROPY DURING JIM CROW" ~ "Madam C. J. Walker's Gospel of Giving",
    `Short Title` == 'MAKE IT STICK' ~ 'Make It Stick',
    `Short Title` == 'MAKE IT STICK : THE SCIENCE OF SUCCESSFUL LEARNING' ~ 'Make It Stick',
    `Short Title` == 'MAKING AND TINKERING WITH STEM : SOLVING DESIGN CHALLENGES WITH YOUNG CHILDREN' ~ 'Making and Tinkering with STEM',
    `Short Title` == 'MAKING RACE AND NATION' ~ 'Making Race and Nation',
    `Short Title` == "MANAGING VULNERABILITY : SOUTH AFRICA'S STRUGGLE FOR A DEMOCRATIC RHETORIC" ~ 'Managing Vulnerability',
    `Short Title` == 'MASTERING QGIS  SECOND EDITION' ~ 'Mastering QGIS - Second Edition',
    `Short Title` == 'MATH METHODS F/PHYSICISTS' ~ 'Math Methods for Physicists',
    `Short Title` == 'MATHEMATICAL METHODS FOR PHYSICISTS (FREE DIGITAL ACCESS- UTK LIBRARY)' ~ 'Mathematical Methods for Physicists (Seventh Edition)',
    `Short Title` == 'MAXIMIZING THE IMPACT OF COMICS IN YOUR LIBRARY' ~ 'Maximizing the Impact of Comics in Your Library: Graphic Novels, Manga, and More',
    `Short Title` == 'MERE CHRISTIANITY' ~ "C. S. Lewis's Mere Christianity",
    `Short Title` == 'METALS AND SOCIETY : AN INTRODUCTION TO ECONOMIC GEOLOGY' ~ 'Metals and Society',
    `Short Title` == 'MIDDLE RANGE THEORY FOR NURSING' ~ 'Middle Range Theory for Nursing',
    `Short Title` == 'MILK AND FILTH' ~ 'Milk and Filth',
    `Short Title` == 'MODULAR FORMS: A CLASSICAL/COMPUTATIONAL INTRO (FREE DIGITAL ACCESSUTK LIBRARY)' ~ 'Modular Forms: A Classical And Computational Introduction',
    `Short Title` == "MY GRANDMOTHER'S HANDS : RACIALIZED TRAUMA AND THE PATHWAY TO MENDING OUR HEARTS AND BODIES" ~ "My Grandmother's Hands: Racialized Trauma and the Pathway to Mending our Hearts and Bodies",
    `Short Title` == 'NEW JIM CROW' ~ 'The New Jim Crow',
    `Short Title` == 'NEXT STEPS: DECISION CASES F/SOCIAL WORK PRACTICE (FREE DIGITAL ACCESS - UTK LIBRARY)' ~ 'Next Steps',
    `Short Title` == 'OBIT' ~ 'Obit',
    `Short Title` == 'ON THE HISTORY OF POLITICAL PHILOSOPHY : GREAT POLITICAL THINKERS FROM THUCYDIDES TO LOCKE' ~ 'On the History of Political Philosophy',
    `Short Title` == "ORTNER'S IDENTIFICATION OF PATHOLOGICAL CONDITIONS IN HUMAN SKELETAL REMAINS" ~ "Ortner's Identification of Pathological Conditions in Human Skeletal Remains",
    `Short Title` == 'PARADISE: BY THE WINNER OF THE NOBEL PRIZE IN LITERATURE 2021' ~ 'Paradise',
    `Short Title` == 'PASSING' ~ 'Passing',
    `Short Title` == 'PEDAGOGY OF THE OPPRESSED 30TH ANNIV ED W/NEW INTRO' ~ 'Pedagogy of the Oppressed',
    `Short Title` == 'PHASES OF TERRORISM IN THE AGE OF GLOBALIZATION : FROM CHRISTOPHER COLUMBUS TO OSAMA BIN LADEN' ~ 'Phases of Terrorism in the Age of Globalization',
    `Short Title` == 'PLANETARY GEOLOGY: AN INTRODUCTION' ~ 'Planetary Geology',
    `Short Title` == 'PLANETARY GEOLOGY : AN INTRODUCTION' ~ 'Planetary Geology',
    `Short Title` == 'PLANNING FOR PLAY, OBSERVATION, AND LEARNING IN PRESCHOOL AND KINDERGARTEN' ~ 'Planning for Play, Observation, and Learning in Preschool and Kindergarten',
    `Short Title` == 'POLITICAL STYLE : THE ARTISTRY OF POWER' ~ 'Political Style',
    `Short Title` == 'POWER: RADICAL VIEW' ~ 'POWER',
    `Short Title` == 'PRACTICAL GUIDE TO COMMERCIAL REAL' ~ 'A Practical Guide to Commercial Real Estate Transactions: From Contract to Closing',
    `Short Title` == 'PRACTICAL IMPLEMENTATION IN SOCIAL WORK PRACTICE : A GUIDE TO ENGAGING IN EVIDENCE-BASED PRACTICE' ~ 'Practical Implementation in Social Work Practice',
    `Short Title` == 'PRACTICAL RADICALS : SEVEN STRATEGIES TO CHANGE THE WORLD' ~ 'Practical Radicals',
    `Short Title` == 'PREDICTIVE ANALYTICS : THE POWER TO PREDICT WHO WILL CLICK, BUY, LIE, OR DIE' ~ 'Predictive Analytics',
    `Short Title` == '(PRINT) FORENSIC ANTHROPOLOGY' ~ 'Forensic Anthropology',
    `Short Title` == '(PRINT) PEDAGOGICAL GRAMMAR' ~ 'Pedagogical Grammar',
    `Short Title` == '(PRINT) SONG OF THE EARTH' ~ 'The Song of the Earth',
    `Short Title` == 'PROBABILITY, A GRADUATE COURSE (FREE DIGITAL ACCESS- UTK LIBRARY)' ~ 'Probability: A Graduate Course',
    `Short Title` == 'PROBABILITY, A GRADUATE COURSE' ~ 'Probability: A Graduate Course',
    `Short Title` == 'PROBABILITY, A GRADUATE COURSE (FREE DIGITAL ACCESS UTK LIBRARY)' ~ 'Probability: A Graduate Course',
    `Short Title` == 'PROCESSED BASED CBT' ~ 'Process-Based CBT: The Science and Core Clinical Competencies of Cognitive Behavioral Therapy',
    `Short Title` == 'PROFESSIONAL DEVELOPMENT : WHAT WORKS' ~ 'Professional Development: What Works',
    `Short Title` == 'PROPERTY OF THE REBEL LIBRARIAN' ~ 'Property of the Rebel Librarian',
    `Short Title` == 'PUBLIC LIBRARIES AND THEIR COMMUNITIES' ~ 'Public Libraries and Their Communities',
    `Short Title` == 'PUBLIC SPEAKING FOR ENGINEERS : COMMUNICATING EFFECTIVELY WITH CLIENTS, THE PUBLIC, AND LOCAL GOVERNMENT' ~ 'Public Speaking for Engineers: Communicating Effectively with Clients, the Public, and Local Government',
    `Short Title` == 'QUALITATIVE RESEARCH : A GUIDE TO DESIGN AND IMPLEMENTATION' ~ 'Qualitative Research',
    `Short Title` == 'QUEER RELIGIOSITIES : AN INTRODUCTION TO QUEER AND TRANSGENDER STUDIES IN RELIGION' ~ 'Queer Religiosities',
    `Short Title` == 'R FOR POLITICAL SCIENCE RESEARCH : AN INTRODUCTION FOR ABSOLUTE BEGINNERS' ~ 'R for Political Science Research',
    `Short Title` == 'RACE AND REUNION : THE CIVIL WAR IN AMERICAN MEMORY' ~ 'Race and Reunion',
    `Short Title` == 'RACIAL THEORIES IN SOCIAL SCIENCE' ~ 'Racial Theories in Social Science: A Systemic Racism Critique',
    `Short Title` == 'RAMBLES OF A RUNAWAY FROM SOUTHERN SLAVERY' ~ 'Rambles of a Runaway from Southern Slavery',
    `Short Title` == 'REAL ANALYSIS FOR THE UNDERGRADUATE : WITH AN INVITATION TO FUNCTIONAL ANALYSIS' ~ 'Real Analysis for the Undergraduate',
    `Short Title` == 'RECENT DEVELOPMENTS IN SOUTHEASTERN ARCHAEOLOGY' ~ 'Recent Developments in Southeastern Archaeology',
    `Short Title` == 'RECREATION PROGRAMMING, 8TH ED. DESIGNING, STAGING, AND MANAGING THE DELIVERY OF LEISURE EXPERIENCES' ~ 'Recreation Programming',
    `Short Title` == 'REGRESSION ANALYSIS AND LINEAR MODELS : CONCEPTS, APPLICATIONS, AND IMPLEMENTATION' ~ 'Regression Analysis and Linear Models',
    `Short Title` == 'REGRESSION METHODS IN BIOSTATISTICS' ~ 'Regression Methods in Biostatistics',
    `Short Title` == 'RELIGION IN A CHANGING WORKPLACE' ~ 'Religion in a Changing Workplace',
    `Short Title` == 'RESPONSIBLE CONDUCT OF RESEARCH' ~ 'Responsible Conduct of Research',
    `Short Title` == 'RULES OF PLAY : GAME DESIGN FUNDAMENTALS' ~ 'Rules of Play: Game Design Fundamentals',
    `Short Title` == 'SCHOOL SOCIAL WORK : A SKILLS-BASED COMPETENCY APPROACH' ~ 'School Social Work',
    `Short Title` == 'SCIENCE NOTEBOOKS IN STUDENT-CENTERED CLASSROOMS' ~ 'Science Notebooks in Student-Centered Classrooms',
    `Short Title` == 'SCRAPING BY' ~ 'Scraping By: Wage Labor, Slavery, and Survival in Early Baltimore',
    `Short Title` == 'SENSORY EVALUATION OF FOOD : PRINCIPLES AND PRACTICES' ~ 'Sensory Evaluation of Food',
    `Short Title` == 'SHIPS AND SEAMANSHIP IN THE ANCIENT WORLD' ~ 'Ships and Seamanship in the Ancient World',
    `Short Title` == 'SILAS MARNER : THE WEAVER OF RAVELOE' ~ 'Silas Marner: The Weaver of Raveloe',
    `Short Title` == 'SILENT WITNESSES' ~ 'Silent Witnesses',
    `Short Title` == 'SILENT WITNESSES : THE OFTEN GRUESOME BUT ALWAYS FASCINATING HISTORY OF FORENSIC SCIENCE' ~ 'Silent Witnesses',
    `Short Title` == 'SKILL ACQUISITION IN SPORT : THEORY AND PRACTICE' ~ 'Skill Acquisition in Sport',
    `Short Title` == 'SOCIAL MOVEMENTS : THE STRUCTURE OF COLLECTIVE MOBILIZATION' ~ 'Social Movements: The Structure of Collective Mobilization',
    `Short Title` == 'SOCIAL THEORY OF INTERNATIONAL POLITICS' ~ 'Social Theory of International Politics',
    `Short Title` == 'SOCIAL WELFARE POLICY F/A SUSTAINABLE FUTURE' ~ 'Social Welfare Policy for a Sustainable Future',
    `Short Title` == 'SOCIAL WORK PRACTICE & PSYCHOPHARMACOLOGY' ~ 'Social Work Practice and Psychopharmacology',
    `Short Title` == 'SOCIAL WORK VALUES AND ETHICS' ~ 'Social Work Values and Ethics',
    `Short Title` == 'SOCRATIC QUESTIONING FOR THERAPISTS AND COUNSELORS : LEARN HOW TO THINK AND INTERVENE LIKE A COGNITIVE BEHAVIOR THERAPIST' ~ 'Socratic Questioning for Therapists and Counselors',
    `Short Title` == 'SONG WALKING : WOMEN, MUSIC, AND ENVIRONMENTAL JUSTICE IN AN AFRICAN BORDERLAND' ~ 'Song Walking: Women, Music, and Environmental Justice in an African Borderland',
    `Short Title` == 'SONS ET SENS W/LIFETIME ACCESS' ~ 'Sons et Sens',
    `Short Title` == 'SOUNDING LIKE A NO-NO : QUEER SOUNDS AND ECCENTRIC ACTS IN THE POST-SOUL ERA' ~ 'Sounding Like a No-No',
    `Short Title` == 'SPEECH TO PRINT : LANGUAGE ESSENTIALS FOR TEACHERS' ~ 'Speech to Print',
    `Short Title` == 'STATE AND LOCAL PUBLIC FINANCE' ~ 'State and Local Public Finance',
    `Short Title` == 'STATISTICAL MECHANICS : PRINCIPLES AND SELECTED APPLICATIONS' ~ 'Statistical Mechanics',
    `Short Title` == 'STOCHASTIC DIFFERENTIAL EQUATIONS : INTRO W/APPLICATIONS (FREE DIGITAL ACCESSUTK LIBRARY)' ~ 'Stochastic Differential Equations',
    `Short Title` == "STOELTING'S PHARMACOLOGY AND PHYSIOLOGY IN ANESTHETIC PRACTICE" ~ "Stoelting's Pharmacology and Physiology in Anesthetic Practice",
    `Short Title` == 'STORY PROOF : THE SCIENCE BEHIND THE STARTLING POWER OF STORY' ~ 'Story Proof: The Science Behind the Startling Power of Story',
    `Short Title` == 'STORYTELLING WITH DATA : A DATA VISUALIZATION GUIDE FOR BUSINESS PROFESSIONALS' ~ 'Storytelling with Data',
    `Short Title` == 'STORYTELLING WITH YOU : PLAN, CREATE, AND DELIVER A STELLAR PRESENTATION' ~ 'Storytelling with You: Plan, Create, and Deliver a Stellar Presentation',
    `Short Title` == 'STRANGE AS THIS WEATHER HAS BEEN : A NOVEL' ~ 'Strange As This Weather Has Been',
    `Short Title` == 'STRATEGY IN 3D' ~ 'Strategy in 3D',
    `Short Title` == 'STRATEGY IN 3D : ESSENTIAL TOOLS TO DIAGNOSE, DECIDE, AND DELIVER' ~ 'Strategy in 3D',
    `Short Title` == 'SUN ALSO RISES' ~ 'The Sun Also Rises',
    `Short Title` == 'SUPPLY CHAIN PLANNING AND ANALYTICS' ~ 'Supply Chain Planning and Analytics',
    `Short Title` == 'SUPPLY CHAIN TRANSFORMATION: BUILDING AND EXECUTING AN INTEGRATED SUPPLY CHAIN STRATEGY' ~ 'Supply Chain Transformation',
    `Short Title` == 'SURVEY RESEARCH AND ANALYSIS' ~ 'Survey Research and Analysis',
    `Short Title` == 'SYSTEMATIC INSTRUCTION FOR STUDENTS WITH MODERATE AND SEVERE DISABILITIES' ~ 'Systematic Instruction for Students with Moderate and Severe Disabilities',
    `Short Title` == 'SYSTEMS THINKING FOR SOCIAL CHANGE : A PRACTICAL GUIDE TO SOLVING COMPLEX PROBLEMS, AVOIDING UNINTENDED CONSEQUENCES, AND ACHIEVING LASTING RESULTS' ~ 'Systems Thinking For Social Change: A Practical Guide To Solving Complex Problems, Avoiding Unintended Consequences, And Achieving Lasting Results',
    `Short Title` == 'TEACHING AND LEARNING STEM : A PRACTICAL GUIDE' ~ 'Teaching and Learning STEM',
    `Short Title` == 'TEACHING ENGLISH AS A FOREIGN OR SECOND LANGUAGE' ~ 'Teaching English As a Foreign or Second Language, Third Edition',
    `Short Title` == 'TEACHING ENGLISH AS A FOREIGN OR SECOND LANGUAGE, THIRD EDITION :' ~ 'Teaching English As a Foreign or Second Language, Third Edition',
    `Short Title` == 'THE AMATEUR HOUR : A HISTORY OF COLLEGE TEACHING IN AMERICA' ~ 'The Amateur Hour',
    `Short Title` == 'THE AMERICAN TELEVISION INDUSTRY' ~ 'The American Television Industry',
    `Short Title` == 'THE ANTINOMIAN CONTROVERSY, 16361638 : A DOCUMENTARY HISTORY' ~ 'The Antinomian Controversy, 1636-1638',
    `Short Title` == 'THE BASICS OF PUBLIC BUDGETING AND FINANCIAL MANAGEMENT : A HANDBOOK FOR ACADEMICS AND PRACTITIONERS' ~ 'Basics of Public Budgeting and Financial Management: A Handbook for Academics and Practitioners',
    `Short Title` == 'THE ANXIOUS GENERATION : HOW THE GREAT REWIRING OF CHILDHOOD IS CAUSING AN EPIDEMIC OF MENTAL ILLNESS' ~ 'The Anxious Generation',
    `Short Title` == 'THE ART OF THE PITCH : PERSUASION AND PRESENTATION SKILLS THAT WIN BUSINESS' ~ 'The Art of the Pitch',
    `Short Title` == 'THE BUDDHIST WORLD OF SOUTHEAST ASIA' ~ 'The Buddhist World of Southeast Asia',
    `Short Title` == 'THE CASTRATO : REFLECTIONS ON NATURES AND KINDS' ~ 'The Castrato',
    `Short Title` == 'THE CHILDREN OF SOLAGA : INDIGENOUS BELONGING ACROSS THE U. S. -MEXICO BORDER' ~ 'The Children of Solaga',
    `Short Title` == 'THE COMPREHENSIVE GUIDE TO INTERDISCIPLINARY VETERINARY SOCIAL WORK' ~ 'The Comprehensive Guide to Interdisciplinary Veterinary Social Work',
    `Short Title` == 'THE ETHICAL EXECUTIVE : BECOMING AWARE OF THE ROOT CAUSES OF UNETHICAL BEHAVIOR: 45 PSYCHOLOGICAL TRAPS THAT EVERY ONE OF US FALLS PREY TO' ~ 'The Ethical Executive',
    `Short Title` == 'THE FASCINATING WORLD OF GRAPH THEORY' ~ 'The Fascinating World of Graph Theory',
    `Short Title` == 'THE IDEAL TEAM PLAYER : HOW TO RECOGNIZE AND CULTIVATE THE THREE ESSENTIAL VIRTUES' ~ 'The Ideal Team Player: How to Recognize and Cultivate the Three Essential Virtues',
    `Short Title` == 'THE LIFE OF SAINT KATHERINE OF ALEXANDRIA' ~ 'The Life of Saint Katherine of Alexandria',
    `Short Title` == "THE MEDIATOR'S HANDBOOK : REVISED AND EXPANDED FOURTH EDITION" ~ "The Mediator's Handbook",
    `Short Title` == 'THE MITKI AND THE ART OF POSTMODERN PROTEST IN RUSSIA' ~ 'The Mitki and the Art of Postmodern Protest in Russia',
    `Short Title` == 'THE MUSEUM OF UNNATURAL HISTORIES' ~ 'The Museum of Unnatural Histories',
    `Short Title` == 'THE NAMES OF THE PYTHON : BELONGING IN EAST AFRICA, 900 TO 1930' ~ 'The Names of the Python: Belonging in East Africa, 900 to 1930',
    `Short Title` == 'THE NEW JIM CROW : MASS INCARCERATION IN THE AGE OF COLORBLINDNESS' ~ 'The New Jim Crow',
    `Short Title` == 'THE OROMO MOVEMENT AND IMPERIAL POLITICS' ~ 'The Oromo Movement and Imperial Politics: Culture and Ideology in Oromia and Ethiopia',
    `Short Title` == 'THE STORY OF RELIGION IN AMERICA : AN INTRODUCTION' ~ 'The Story of Religion in America: An Introduction',
    `Short Title` == 'THE STUDENT LEADERSHIP CHALLENGE : STUDENT WORKBOOK AND LEADERSHIP JOURNAL' ~ 'The Student Leadership Challenge: Student Workbook and Leadership Journal',
    `Short Title` == 'THE SUPPLY AND OPERATIONS MANGEMENT COLLECTION: SUPPLY CHAIN PLANNING AND ANALYTICS : THE RIGHT PRODUCT IN THE RIGHT PLACE AT THE RIGHT TIME' ~ 'Supply Chain Planning and Analytics',
    `Short Title` == 'THE TRADITION' ~ 'The Tradition',
    `Short Title` == 'THE TROJANS AND THEIR NEIGHBOURS' ~ 'The Trojans and Their Neighbours',
    `Short Title` == 'THE TWO FUNDAMENTAL PROBLEMS OF ETHICS' ~ 'The Two Fundamental Problems of Ethics',
    `Short Title` == 'THE WORLD OF MEXICAN MIGRANTS : THE ROCK AND THE HARD PLACE' ~ 'The World of Mexican Migrants',
    `Short Title` == 'THEORIES OF CHILDHOOD' ~ 'Theories of Childhood, Second Edition',
    `Short Title` == 'THROUGH THE ARC OF THE RAIN FOREST' ~ 'Through the Arc of the Rain Forest',
    `Short Title` == 'TIME SERIES ECONOMETRICS : LEARNING THROUGH REPLICATION' ~ 'Time Series Econometrics',
    `Short Title` == 'TOTALITARIANISM' ~ 'Totalitarianism',
    `Short Title` == 'TRANSPORT MODELING FOR ENVIRONMENTAL ENGINEERS AND SCIENTISTS' ~ 'Transport Modeling for Environmental Engineers and Scientists',
    `Short Title` == 'TRAUMA-FOCUSED ACT' ~ "Trauma-Focused ACT: A Practitioner's Guide to Working with Mind, Body, and Emotion Using Acceptance and Commitment Therapy",
    `Short Title` == 'TREE STORY : THE HISTORY OF THE WORLD WRITTEN IN RINGS' ~ 'Tree Story',
    `Short Title` == 'UNACCUMSTOMED EARTH W/LIFETIME ACCESS' ~ 'Unaccustomed Earth',
    `Short Title` == 'UNKINDNESS OF GHOSTS' ~ 'An Unkindness of Ghosts',
    `Short Title` == 'UNLOCKING MULTILINGUAL LEARNERS? POTENTIAL' ~ 'Unlocking Multilingual Learners Potential',
    `Short Title` == 'UNMENTIONABLES : TEXTILES, GARMENT WORK, AND THE SYRIAN AMERICAN WORKING CLASS' ~ 'Unmentionables',
    `Short Title` == 'VERSIFICATION(OP)(FREE DIGITAL ACCESS-UTK LIBRARY)' ~ 'Versification',
    `Short Title` == "WATER 4. 0 : THE PAST, PRESENT, AND FUTURE OF THE WORLD'S MOST VITAL RESOURCE" ~ 'Water 4. 0',
    `Short Title` == "WETZEL'S LIMNOLOGY : LAKE AND RIVER ECOSYSTEMS" ~ "Wetzel's Limnology (Fourth Edition)",
    `Short Title` == 'WHAT NOISE AGAINST THE CANE' ~ 'What Noise Against the Cane',
    `Short Title` == 'WHAT REALLY WORKS WITH EXCEPTIONAL LEARNERS' ~ 'What Really Works with Exceptional Learners',
    `Short Title` == 'WHEN ASIA WAS WORLD' ~ 'When Asia Was the World',
    `Short Title` == 'WHEN MY BROTHER WAS AN AZTEC' ~ 'When My Brother Was an Aztec',
    `Short Title` == "WHERE'S THE MATH? : BOOKS, GAMES, AND ROUTINES TO SPARK CHILDREN'S THINKING" ~ "Where's the Math?",
    `Short Title` == "WHY KIDS CAN'T READ : CONTINUING TO CHALLENGE THE STATUS QUO IN EDUCATION" ~ "Why Kids Can't Read",
    `Short Title` == 'WHY PEOPLE DIE BY SUICIDE' ~ 'Why People Die by Suicide',
    `Short Title` == 'WHY WAR? : THE CULTURAL LOGIC OF IRAQ, THE GULF WAR, AND SUEZ' ~ 'Why War?',
    `Short Title` == 'WHY WE LOST THE ERA' ~ 'Why We Lost the Era',
    `Short Title` == 'WICKED FLESH : BLACK WOMEN, INTIMACY, AND FREEDOM IN THE ATLANTIC WORLD' ~ 'Wicked Flesh',
    `Short Title` == 'WORLD OF POMPEII (W/CD ONLY)' ~ 'The World of Pompeii',
    `Short Title` == 'WORLD RELIGIONS IN SEVEN SENTENCES : A SMALL INTRODUCTION TO A VAST TOPIC' ~ 'World Religions in Seven Sentences: A Small Introduction to a Vast Topic',
    `Short Title` == 'YAGUARETE WHITE' ~ 'Yaguareté White',
    `Short Title` == 'YORK MYSTERY PLAYS' ~ 'York Mystery Plays',
    `Short Title` == 'YVAIN : THE KNIGHT OF THE LION' ~ 'Yvain',
    `Short Title` == 'ZAMI: A NEW SPELLING OF MY NAME : A BIOMYTHOGRAPHY' ~ 'Zami',
    
    #Fixes for Titles With Extra Text in Them or Different Formatting, but No Usage
    ##This is done to make the PowerBI report look nice
    
    `Short Title` == 'A COURSE IN ENUMERATION PROBABILITY, A GRADUATE COURSE (FREE DIGITAL ACCESS UTK LIBRARY)' ~ 'A Course in Enumeration Probability, a Graduate Course',
    `Short Title` == 'AFFRILACHIA (OLD COVE PRESS)' ~ 'Affrilachia',
    `Short Title` == 'FUNDAMENTALS OF PHYSICS II : ELECTROMAGNETISM, OPTICS, AND QUANTUM MECHANICS' ~ 'Fundamentals of Physics II: Electromagnetism, Optics, and Quantum Mechanics',
    `Short Title` == 'HANDBOOK F/CLASSICAL RESEARCH' ~ 'Handbook for Classical Research',
    `Short Title` == 'UNDERSTANDING SPIRITUALITY AND THE SACRED IN SOCIAL WORK PRACTICE : SPIRITED CONVERSATIONS' ~ 'Understanding Spirituality And The Sacred In Social Work Practice',
    `Short Title` == 'UNIVERSITY PHYSICS VOLUME 3 (FREE ACCESS- OPENSTAX)' ~ 'University Physics: Volume 3',
    
    #Default Case - Format as a Title
    ##Also done to make the PowerBI report look nice
    .default = str_to_title(`Short Title`)
  )) |>
  select(UsageTitle, `Short Title`, `Book Author`, ISBN, `MMS ID`, `Book Publisher`, `Electronic Availability`, Semester)

bookstoreListShort
```





# Load Usage Database


FOR EACH SEMESTER, add new sum functions for each new month of usage being tracked. 

This will also require that usage being gathered in advance. It is best practice to use the "mid-semester" TR_B3 table built for this project, since the usage will need to be gathered outside of our normal January and July gathering periods.


```{r}
con <- dbConnect(SQLite(), "C:\\Users\\aharrima\\OneDrive - University of Tennessee\\Documents\\Big_Usage_Database_Updated.db")

TR_B3 <- dbGetQuery(con,
                    "SELECT Title
                    , SUM(`Jan-2024`) AS `Jan-2024`
                    , SUM(`Feb-2024`) AS `Feb-2024`
                    , SUM(`Mar-2024`) AS `Mar-2024`
                    , SUM(`Apr-2024`) AS `Apr-2024`
                    , SUM(`May-2024`) AS `May-2024`
                    , SUM(`Jun-2024`) AS `Jun-2024`
                    , SUM(`Jul-2024`) AS `Jul-2024`
                    , SUM(`Aug-2024`) AS `Aug-2024`
                    , SUM(`Sep-2024`) AS `Sep-2024`
                    , SUM(`Oct-2024`) AS `Oct-2024`
                    , SUM(`Nov-2024`) AS `Nov-2024`
                    , SUM(`Dec-2024`) AS `Dec-2024`
                    , SUM(`Jan-2025`) AS `Jan-2025`
                    , SUM(`Feb-2025`) AS `Feb-2025`
                    , SUM(`Mar-2025`) AS `Mar-2025`
                    , SUM(`Apr-2025`) AS `Apr-2025`
                    , SUM(`May-2025`) AS `May-2025`
                    , SUM(`Jun-2025`) AS `Jun-2025`
                    , SUM(`Jul-2025`) AS `Jul-2025`
                    , SUM(`Aug-2025`) AS `Aug-2025`
                    , SUM(`Sep-2025`) AS `Sep-2025`
                    , SUM(`Oct-2025`) AS `Oct-2025`
                    , SUM(`Nov-2025`) AS `Nov-2025`
                    , SUM(`Dec-2025`) AS `Dec-2025`
                    , SUM(`Jan-2026`) AS `Jan-2026`
                    , SUM(`Feb-2026`) AS `Feb-2026`
                    , SUM(`Mar-2026`) AS `Mar-2026`
                    , SUM(`Apr-2026`) AS `Apr-2026`
                    , SUM(`May-2026`) AS `May-2026`
                    , Reporting_Period_Total
                    FROM TR_B3_VolBooks
                    WHERE Metric_Type == 'Unique_Title_Requests'
                    GROUP BY Title
                    ORDER BY Title")

TR_B3 <- TR_B3 |>
  mutate(Title = case_when(
    Title == 'Social Movements' ~ 'Social Movements: The Structure of Collective Mobilization',
    Title == 'The Ideal Team Player' ~ 'The Ideal Team Player: How to Recognize and Cultivate the Three Essential Virtues',
    .default = Title
  ))

dim(TR_B3)
```



# Join to Bookstore List


```{r}
bookstoreWithUsage <- left_join(bookstoreListShort, TR_B3, by = c('UsageTitle' = 'Title'))

bookstoreWithUsage
```



```{r}
checkList <- bookstoreWithUsage |>
  filter(is.na(Reporting_Period_Total) == TRUE) |>
  arrange(UsageTitle)

checkList
```



# Get Overall Usage for Each Title


FOR EACH SEMESTER, add a new case to the case_when statement by copying a code block and adjusting semester and month names.


MAKE SURE THE ZEROES APPEAR PROPERLY HERE

```{r}
bookstoreTitleUsage <- bookstoreWithUsage |>
  group_by(UsageTitle, Semester) |>
  summarise(Total_Usage = case_when(
    Semester == 'Spring 2024' ~ ifelse(is.na(`Jan-2024`) == TRUE, 0, `Jan-2024`)
                              + ifelse(is.na(`Feb-2024`) == TRUE, 0, `Feb-2024`)
                              + ifelse(is.na(`Mar-2024`) == TRUE, 0, `Mar-2024`)
                              + ifelse(is.na(`Apr-2024`) == TRUE, 0, `Apr-2024`)
                              + ifelse(is.na(`May-2024`) == TRUE, 0, `May-2024`),
    Semester == 'Fall 2024' ~ ifelse(is.na(`Aug-2024`) == TRUE, 0, `Aug-2024`)
                              + ifelse(is.na(`Sep-2024`) == TRUE, 0, `Sep-2024`)
                              + ifelse(is.na(`Oct-2024`) == TRUE, 0, `Oct-2024`)
                              + ifelse(is.na(`Nov-2024`) == TRUE, 0, `Nov-2024`)
                              + ifelse(is.na(`Dec-2024`) == TRUE, 0, `Dec-2024`),
    Semester == 'Spring 2025' ~ ifelse(is.na(`Jan-2025`) == TRUE, 0, `Jan-2025`)
                              + ifelse(is.na(`Feb-2025`) == TRUE, 0, `Feb-2025`)
                              + ifelse(is.na(`Mar-2025`) == TRUE, 0, `Mar-2025`)
                              + ifelse(is.na(`Apr-2025`) == TRUE, 0, `Apr-2025`)
                              + ifelse(is.na(`May-2025`) == TRUE, 0, `May-2025`),
    Semester == 'Fall 2025' ~ ifelse(is.na(`Aug-2025`) == TRUE, 0, `Aug-2025`)
                              + ifelse(is.na(`Sep-2025`) == TRUE, 0, `Sep-2025`)
                              + ifelse(is.na(`Oct-2025`) == TRUE, 0, `Oct-2025`)
                              + ifelse(is.na(`Nov-2025`) == TRUE, 0, `Nov-2025`)
                              + ifelse(is.na(`Dec-2025`) == TRUE, 0, `Dec-2025`),
    Semester == 'Spring 2026' ~ ifelse(is.na(`Jan-2026`) == TRUE, 0, `Jan-2026`)
                              + ifelse(is.na(`Feb-2026`) == TRUE, 0, `Feb-2026`)
                              + ifelse(is.na(`Mar-2026`) == TRUE, 0, `Mar-2026`)
                              + ifelse(is.na(`Apr-2026`) == TRUE, 0, `Apr-2026`)
                              + ifelse(is.na(`May-2026`) == TRUE, 0, `May-2026`)
  )) |>
  ungroup() |>
  group_by(UsageTitle, Semester) |>
  summarise(Total_Usage = sum(Total_Usage)) |>
  ungroup() |>
  distinct() |>
  mutate(Total_Usage = ifelse(is.na(Total_Usage) == TRUE, 0, Total_Usage)) |>
  mutate(Has_Usage = ifelse(Total_Usage > 0, 'Yes', 'No')) |>
  arrange(desc(Total_Usage))
  
bookstoreTitleUsage
```


# Get the Total Usage by Semester

```{r}
semesterUsage <- bookstoreTitleUsage |>
  group_by(Semester) |>
  summarise(Titles = n(),
            Total_Usage = sum(Total_Usage),
            Titles_With_Usage = sum(ifelse(Has_Usage == 'Yes', 1, 0))) |>
  mutate(Title_Usage_Perc = round(100.0*(Titles_With_Usage / Titles), 1)) |>
  arrange(Semester)

semesterUsage
```



# Add in Cost Per Use and Average Use


```{r}
costPerUse <- inner_join(semesterUsage, ttsMetrics, by = 'Semester') 
  
costPerUseFinal <- costPerUse |>
  mutate(Average_Usage = Total_Usage / Titles,
         Cost = `Total Cost`) |>
  mutate(Average_Cost = Cost / Titles) |>
  mutate(Cost_Use = round(Cost / Total_Usage, 2)) |>
  select(Semester, Titles, Total_Usage, Titles_With_Usage, Title_Usage_Perc, Average_Usage, Average_Cost, Cost_Use)

costPerUseFinal
```


```{r}
joinC <- inner_join(joinB, costPerUseFinal, by = 'Semester')

joinC
```



# Get the Cost for Each Title

All titles purchased after Fall 2024 should have a note attached to their order record suggesting they are part of the textbook program. See two cells below.


## Spring 2024 and Fall 2024

```{r}
costs <- read_excel('Course Materials Bought for the Bookstore 2024.xlsx')

filteredCosts <- costs |>
  filter(Title %in% c(
    # Spring 2024
    'Models of the mind : how physics, engineering and mathematics have shaped our understanding of the brain /',
    
    # Fall 2024
    'How to write a lot : a practical guide to productive academic writing /',
    'Strategy in 3D : essential tools to diagnose, decide, & deliver /'

  )) |>
  mutate(CostTitle = case_when(
    # Spring 2024
    Title == 'Models of the mind : how physics, engineering and mathematics have shaped our understanding of the brain /' ~ 'Models of the Mind',
    
    # Fall 2024
    Title == 'How to write a lot : a practical guide to productive academic writing /' ~ 'How to Write a Lot: A Practical Guide to Productive Academic Writing',
    Title == 'Strategy in 3D : essential tools to diagnose, decide, & deliver /' ~ 'Strategy in 3D'
  )) |>
  mutate(Semester = case_when(
    `Transaction Date Year-Month` %in% c('2023-11', '2023-12', '2024-01', '2024-02', '2024-03', '2024-04') ~ 'Spring 2024',
    `Transaction Date Year-Month` %in% c('2024-05', '2024-06', '2024-07', '2024-08', '2024-09', '2024-10') ~ 'Fall 2024'
  )) |>
  select(CostTitle, Semester, `Transaction Expenditure Amount`)

filteredCosts
```
