## Spring 2025 to Present

FOR EACH SEMESTER, re-download an updated "Course Materials Bought for the Bookstore All Time" file. Then, grab all titles purchased during that semester in the first part of the function below, and edit the Alma given names to MATCH THE USAGE NAMES FOR EACH TITLE in the second part of the function below. Also, add in a new line for the Semester fill-in by lining up the six-month Transation period to the new semester.



## Load and Mutate the Order History File

```{r}
textbookOrders <- read_excel('Rialto All Order History Jun 12.xlsx') |>
  filter(grepl('Textbook', `Internal note`) == TRUE) |>
  mutate(Semester = case_when(
    grepl('Spring 25', `Internal note`) == TRUE | grepl('Spring25', `Internal note`) == TRUE | grepl('Textbook Purchase', `Internal note`) == TRUE ~ 'Spring 2025',
    grepl('Fall 2025', `Internal note`) == TRUE | grepl('Fall2025', `Internal note`) == TRUE ~ 'Fall 2025',
    grepl('Spring2026', `Internal note`) == TRUE ~ 'Spring 2026',
    Selector == 'Adiba, Afia' & grepl('Summer2026', `Internal note`) == FALSE ~ 'Spring 2026',
    grepl('Summer2026', `Internal note`) == TRUE ~ 'Summer 2026',
    .default = 'Not Applicable'
  )) |>
  mutate(`Total cost` = as.numeric(`Total cost`))
```


## Line Up Title Names to the Usage

```{r}
cleanTextbookOrders <- textbookOrders |>
  mutate(CleanTitle = case_when(
    # Spring 2025
    Title == 'A Tale of Two Cultures : Qualitative and Quantitative Research in the Social Sciences' ~ 'A Tale of Two Cultures',
    Title == "A Writer's Diary"  ~ "A Writer's Diary",
    Title == 'After Victory : Institutions, Strategic Restraint, and the Rebuilding of Order after Major Wars, New Edition' ~ 'After Victory',
    Title == 'Between the Acts (Annotated)' ~ 'Between the Acts',
    Title == 'Bluets' ~ 'Bluets',
    Title == 'Chaste Passions : Medieval English Virgin Martyr Legends' ~ 'Chaste Passions',
    Title == 'Curves and Surfaces' ~ 'Curves and Surfaces',
    Title == 'Designs for Living and Learning, Second Edition : Transforming Early Childhood Environments' ~ 'Designs for Living and Learning, Second Edition',
    Title == 'Differential Geometry : Curves --- Surfaces --- Manifolds, Third Edition' ~ 'Differential Geometry: Manifolds, Curves, and Surfaces',
    Title == 'Dome of the Hidden Pavilion : New Poems' ~ 'Dome of the Hidden Pavilion',
    Title == 'Econometric Analysis of Cross Section and Panel Data, Second Edition' ~ 'Econometric Analysis of Cross Section and Panel Data, Second Edition',
    Title == 'Engaged anthropology : politics beyond the text / Stuart Kirsch' ~ 'Engaged Anthropology',
    Title == 'Fatal Invention : How Science, Politics, and Big Business Re-Create Race in the Twenty-First Century' ~ 'Fatal Invention',
    Title == 'Financial Literacy for Managers : Finance and Accounting for Better Decision-Making' ~ 'Financial Literacy for Managers',
    Title == 'Following Muhammad : Rethinking Islam in the Contemporary World' ~ 'Following Muhammad',
    Title == 'Foreign Front : Third World Politics in Sixties West Germany' ~ 'Foreign Front',
    Title == 'Freedom Farmers : Agricultural Resistance and the Black Freedom Movement' ~ 'Freedom Farmers',
    Title == 'From the Tricontinental to the global South : race, radicalism, and transnational solidarity / Anne Garland Mahler' ~ 'From the Tricontinental to the Global South',
    Title == 'How Journalists Engage: A Theory of Trust Building, Identities, & Care' ~ 'How Journalists Engage',
    Title == 'How to Keep Your Cool : An Ancient Guide to Anger Management' ~ 'How to Keep Your Cool',
    Title == 'Human Osteology' ~ 'Human Osteology',
    Title == 'Human Rights and Social Justice in a Global Perspective: An Introduction to International Social Work' ~ 'Human Rights and Social Justice in a Global Perspective: An Introduction to International Social Work',
    Title == 'Invasive Species: What Everyone Needs to Know' ~ 'Invasive Species',
    Title == 'Keywords in Sound' ~ 'Keywords in Sound',
    Title == "Madam C. J. Walker's Gospel of Giving : Black Women's Philanthropy During Jim Crow" ~ "Madam C. J. Walker's Gospel of Giving",
    Title == 'Mobilizing Japanese youth : the Cold War and the making of the sixties generation / Christopher Gerteis' ~ 'Mobilizing Japanese Youth',
    Title == 'Population Health : Concepts and Methods' ~ 'Population Health',
    Title == 'Recreation Programming : Designing, Staging, and Managing the Delivery of Leisure Experiences' ~ 'Recreation Programming',
    Title == 'Ships and Seamanship in the Ancient World' ~ 'Ships and Seamanship in the Ancient World',
    Title == 'The Book of Margery Kempe' ~ 'The Book of Margery Kempe',
    Title == 'The children of Solaga : indigenous belonging across the U.S.-Mexico border / Daina Sanchez' ~ 'The Children of Solaga',
    Title == 'The Comprehensive Guide to Interdisciplinary Veterinary Social Work' ~ 'The Comprehensive Guide to Interdisciplinary Veterinary Social Work',
    Title == 'The Ethical Executive : Becoming Aware of the Root Causes of Unethical Behavior: 45 Psychological Traps That Every One of Us Falls Prey To' ~ 'The Ethical Executive',
    Title == 'The Female Man' ~ 'The Female Man',
    Title == 'The House on Mango Street' ~ 'The House on Mango Street',
    Title == 'The Private Memoirs and Confessions of a Justified Sinner' ~ 'The Private Memoirs and Confessions of a Justified Sinner',
    Title == 'The Pursuit of Italy : A History of a Land, Its Regions, and Their Peoples' ~ 'The Pursit of Italy',
    Title == 'The Tradition' ~ 'The Tradition',
    Title == 'The Tragedy of Macbeth: the Oxford Shakespeare' ~ 'Macbeth',
    Title == "Things They Carried - Tim O'Brien" ~ 'Things They Carried',
    Title == 'Through the Arc of the Rain Forest' ~ 'Through the Arc of the Rain Forest',
    Title == 'Unchained Voices : An Anthology of Black Authors in the English-Speaking World of the Eighteenth Century' ~ 'Unchained Voices',
    Title == 'Unmentionables : textiles, garment work, and the Syrian American working class / Stacy D. Fahrenthold' ~ 'Unmentionables',
    Title == 'Why people die by suicide / Thomas Joiner' ~ 'Why People Die by Suicide',
    Title == 'Why War? : The Cultural Logic of Iraq, the Gulf War, and Suez' ~ 'Why War?',
    Title == 'World religions in seven sentences : a small introduction to a vast topic / Douglas Groothuis' ~ 'World Religions in Seven Sentences: A Small Introduction to a Vast Topic',
    Title == 'York Mystery Plays: A Selection in Modern Spelling' ~ 'York Mystery Plays',
    
    # Fall 2025
    Title == '14-18 : Understanding the Great War' ~ '14-18',
    Title == '58-IN-MIND : multilingual teaching strategies for diverse deaf students / edited by Debbie Golos, Marlon Kuntze, Kimberly Wolbers, Chris Kurz' ~ '58-IN-MIND',
    Title == 'A Course in Mathematical Modeling' ~ 'A Course in Mathematical Modeling',
    Title == 'A Guide to U. S. Environmental Law' ~ 'A Guide to U.S. Environmental Law',
    Title == 'A hero of our time / Mikhail Lermontov ; translated by Vladimir Nabokov in collaboration with Dmitri Nabokov' ~ 'A Hero of our Time',
    Title == 'A Primer of Drug Action : A Concise Nontechnical Guide to the Actions, Uses, and Side Effects of Psychoactive Drugs' ~ 'A Primer of Drug Action',
    Title == 'African Slavery in Latin America and the Caribbean' ~ 'African Slavery in Latin America and the Caribbean',
    Title == 'All in the family : the realignment of American democracy since the 1960s / Robert O. Self' ~ 'All in the Family',
    Title == 'American Democracy in Peril' ~ 'American Democracy in Peril',
    Title == 'An uneasy embrace : Africa, India and the spectre of race / Shobana Shankar' ~ 'An Uneasy Embrace',
    Title == "Because of Sex : One Law, Ten Cases, and Fifty Years That Changed American Women's Lives at Work" ~ 'Because of Sex',
    Title == 'Biomechanics of Movement : The Science of Sports, Robotics, and Rehabilitation' ~ 'Biomechanics of Movement',
    Title == 'Building Small : A Toolkit for Real Estate Entrepreneurs, Civic Leaders, and Great Communities' ~ 'Building Small',
    Title == 'Catalog of Unabashed Gratitude' ~ 'Catalog of Unabashed Gratitude',
    Title == "Catiline's Conspiracy, the Jugurthine War, Histories" ~ "Catiline's Conspiracy",
    Title == 'Collected Body' ~ 'Collected Body',
    Title == 'Como água para Chocolate' ~ 'Como água para Chocolate',
    Title == 'Copaganda : How Police and the Media Manipulate Our News' ~ 'Copaganda',
    Title == 'Cultures of Piety : Medieval English Devotional Literature in Translation' ~ 'Cultures of Piety',
    Title == 'Cuna de Gato' ~ 'Cuna de Gato',
    Title == 'Death of Ivan Ilyich & other stories / Leon Tolstoi' ~ 'Death of Ivan Ilyich',
    Title == 'Development As Freedom' ~ 'Development as Freedom',
    Title == 'Educating Students with Severe and Multiple Disabilities : A Collaborative Approach, Fifth Edition' ~ 'Educating Students with Severe and Multiple Disabilities',
    Title == 'Enviromedics: The Impact of Climate Change on Human Health' ~ 'Enviromedics',
    Title == 'Environmental and Natural Resources Economics' ~ 'Environmental and Natural Resources Economics',
    Title == 'Essentials of food science / Vickie A. Vaclavik, Elizabeth W. Christian, Tad Campbell' ~ 'Essentials of Food Science',
    Title == 'Existentialism Is a Humanism' ~ 'Existentialism is a Humanism',
    Title == 'Forging Global Fordism' ~ 'Forging Global Fordism',
    Title == 'Gabriel García Márquez' ~ 'Gabriel García Márquez',
    Title == 'Getting Real About Inequality : Intersectionality in Real Life' ~ 'Getting Real About Inequality',
    Title == "Gods' Man: A Novel in Woodcuts" ~ "Gods' Man",
    Title == 'Good-Bye to All That' ~ 'Good-Bye to All That',
    Title == 'Great Short Stories by American Women' ~ 'Great Short Stories by American Women',
    Title == "Guide to Jim Collins's Good to Great" ~ "Guide to Jim Collins's Good to Great",
    Title == 'Harp of Burma' ~ 'Harp of Burma',
    Title == 'Imperial Apocalypse : The Great War and the Destruction of the Russian Empire' ~ 'Imperial Apocalypse',
    Title == 'Introducing Sociology: A Graphic Guide' ~ 'Introducing Sociology',
    Title == 'James Henry Hammond and the Old South : a design for mastery / Drew Gilpin Faust' ~ 'James Henry Hammond and the Old South',
    Title == "King of the North : Martin Luther King Jr. 's Life of Struggle Outside the South" ~ 'King of the North',
    Title == 'La Casa de Mango Street' ~ 'La Casa de Mango Street',
    Title == 'Leading with questions : how leaders discover powerful answers by knowing how and what to ask / Michael J. Marquardt and Bob Tiede' ~ 'Leading with Questions',
    Title == 'Lincoln and the Triumph of the Nation : Constitutional Conflict in the American Civil War' ~ 'Lincoln and the Triumph of the Nation',
    Title == 'Love of Worker Bees' ~ 'Love of Worker Bees',
    Title == 'Manual NSCA : Fundamentos Del Entrenamiento Personal' ~ 'Manual NSCA',
    Title == 'Merchants of Culture : The Publishing Business in the Twenty-First Century' ~ 'Merchants of Culture',
    Title == 'Mere Christianity' ~ "C. S. Lewis's Mere Christianity",
    Title == 'Motivational Interviewing in Nutrition and Fitness' ~ 'Motivational Interviewing in Nutrition and Fitness',
    Title == 'Narrative of the Life of Frederick Douglass : An American Slave, Written by Himself' ~ 'Narrative of the Life of Frederick Douglass',
    Title == "Njinga of Angola : Africa's Warrior Queen" ~ 'Njinga of Angola',
    Title == 'Oil on Water: a Novel: A Novel' ~ 'Oil on Water',
    Title == 'Panic at the Pump : The Energy Crisis and the Transformation of American Politics in The 1970s' ~ 'Panic at the Pump',
    Title == 'Paradise' ~ 'Paradise', 
    Title == 'Persuasion' ~ 'Persuasion',
    Title == 'Planning for Play, Observation, and Learning in Preschool and Kindergarten' ~ 'Planning for Play, Obversation, and Learning in Preschool and Kindergarten',
    Title == 'Reel Pleasures : Cinema Audiences and Entrepreneurs in Twentieth-Century Urban Tanzania' ~ 'Reel Pleasures',
    Title == 'Religion in a changing workplace / Elaine Howard Ecklund, Denise Daniels, and Christopher P. Scheitle' ~ 'Religion in a Changing Workplace',
    Title == 'Responsible Conduct of Research' ~ 'Responsible Conduct of Research',
    Title == 'Return of the Soldier' ~ 'Return of the Soldier',
    Title == 'Saltwater Slavery : A Middle Passage from Africa to American Diaspora' ~ 'Saltwater Slavery',
    Title == "Siberian Exile: Blood, War, and a Granddaughter's Reckoning" ~ 'Siberian Exile',
    Title == 'Silas Marner: The Weaver of Raveloe' ~ 'Silas Marner',
    Title == 'Sir Gawain and the Green Knight' ~ 'Sir Gawain and the Green Knight',
    Title == 'Speaking with Vampires : Rumor and History in Colonial Africa' ~ 'Speaking with Vampires',
    Title == 'Story Proof: The Science Behind the Startling Power of Story' ~ 'Story Proof: The Science Behind the Startling Power of Story',
    Title == 'Story Smart: Using the Science of Story to Persuade, Influence, Inspire, and Teach' ~ 'Story Smart',
    Title == 'Successful Academic Writing: A Complete Guide for Social and Behavioral Scientists' ~ 'Successful Academic Writing',
    Title == "Summary of Richard Thaler's Nudge: improving decisions about health, wealth, and happiness" ~ "Summary of Richard Thaler's Nudge",
    Title == 'Sustainable Landscape Construction, Third Edition : A Guide to Green Building Outdoors' ~ 'Sustainable Landscape Construction, Third Edition',
    Title == 'Teaching Music Theory : New Voices and Approaches' ~ 'Teaching Music Theory',
    Title == 'The Chain : Farm, Factory, and the Fate of Our Food' ~ 'The Chain',
    Title == 'The Cheese and the Worms : The Cosmos of a Sixteenth-Century Miller' ~ 'The Cheese and the Worms',
    Title == 'The Chinese Must Go : Violence, Exclusion, and the Making of the Alien in America' ~ 'The Chinese Must Go',
    Title == 'The Crucible' ~ 'The Crucible',
    Title == 'The Elements of Style : The Original Edition' ~ 'The Elements of Style',
    Title == 'The Future of an Illusion' ~ 'The Future of an Illusion',
    Title == 'The gas mask in interwar Germany : visions of chemical modernity / Peter Thompson, Science History Institute, Philadelphia' ~ 'The Gas Mask in Interwar Germany',
    Title == 'The Haunting of Hill House' ~ 'The Haunting of Hill House',
    Title == 'The Oxford Handbook of Engineering and Technology in the Classical World' ~ 'The Oxford Handbook of Engineering and Technology in the Classical World',
    Title == 'The Principles of Scientific Management' ~ 'The Principles of Scientific Management',
    Title == 'The Song of the Earth' ~ 'The Song of the Earth',
    Title == 'The Vanquished : Why the First World War Failed to End' ~ 'The Vanquished',
    Title == 'The World of Mexican Migrants : The Rock and the Hard Place' ~ 'The World of Mexican Migrants',
    Title == 'Totalitarianism : Part Three of the Origins of Totalitarianism' ~ 'Totalitarianism',
    Title == 'Transport modeling for environmental engineers and scientists / Mark M. Clark' ~ 'Transport Modeling for Environmental Engineers and Scientists',
    Title == 'Typee : A Peep at Polynesian Life' ~ 'Typee',
    Title == 'Understanding Environmental Pollution' ~ 'Understanding Environmental Pollution',
    Title == 'Using Statistical Methods in Social Science Research : With a Complete SPSS Guide' ~ 'Using Statstical Methods in Social Science Research',
    Title == 'We' ~ 'We',
    Title == 'What Noise Against the Cane' ~ 'What Noise Against the Cane',
    Title == 'Why Civil Resistance Works : The Strategic Logic of Nonviolent Conflict' ~ 'Why Civil Resistance Works',
    Title == "Why Kids Can't Read: Continuing to Challenge the Status Quo in Education" ~ "Why Kids Can't Read",
    Title == 'Why We Lost the ERA' ~ 'Why we Lost the Era',
    Title == 'Writing Science: How to Write Papers That Get Cited and Proposals That Get Funded' ~ 'Writing Science',
    
    # Spring 2026
    Title == 'A Practical Guide to Commercial Real Estate Transactions : From Contract to Closing, Third Edition' ~ 'A Practical Guide to Commercial Real Estate Transactions: From Contract to Closing',
    Title == 'A Short Course in Reading French' ~ 'A Short Course in Reading French',
    Title == 'Affrilachia: Poems' ~ 'Affrilachia: Poems',
    Title == 'After Victory : Institutions, Strategic Restraint, and the Rebuilding of Order after Major Wars / G. John Ikenberry' ~ 'After Victory',
    Title == "American Democracy in Peril : Eight Challenges to America´s Future" ~ 'American Democracy In Peril : Eight Challenges To Americas Future',
    Title == 'American Military Life in the 21st Century: Social, Cultural, and Economic Issues and Trends [2 Volumes]' ~ 'American Military Life in the 21st Century: Social, Cultural, and Economic Issues and Trends [2 Volumes]',
    Title == 'An unkindness of ghosts / Rivers Solomon' ~ 'An Unkindness of Ghosts',
    Title == 'Applied Artificial Intelligence in Business : Concepts and Cases' ~ 'Applied Artificial Intelligence in Business',
    Title == 'Assessment in Counseling : Procedures and Practices' ~ 'Assessment in Counseling: Procedures and Practices',
    Title == 'Cooperation and Conflict Between State and Local Government' ~ 'Cooperation and Conflict Between State and Local Government',
    Title == 'Crack : Rock Cocaine, Street Capitalism, and the Decade of Greed' ~ 'Crack',
    Title == 'Criminological Theory: An Analysis of Its Underlying Assumptions' ~ 'Criminological Theory',
    Title == 'Debating Reform : Conflicting Perspectives on How to Fix the American Political System' ~ 'Debating Reform : Conflicting Perspectives on How to Fix the American Political System',
    Title == 'Elegant Legal Writing' ~ 'Elegant Legal Writing',
    Title == 'Elementary Number Theory' ~ 'Elementary Number Theory',
    Title == 'Epidemiology by Design: A Causal Approach to the Health Sciences' ~ 'Epidemiology by Design',
    Title == "Evelina : or, the history of a young lady's entrance into the world / Frances Burney" ~ "Evelina: Or the History of A Young Lady's Entrance into the World",
    Title == 'Frankenstein' ~ 'Frankenstein',
    Title == 'Fully Nonlinear Elliptic Equations' ~ 'Fully Nonlinear Elliptic Equations',
    Title == 'Fundamentals of Physics II : Electromagnetism, Optics, and Quantum Mechanics' ~ 'Fundamentals of Physics II: Electromagnetism, Optics, and Quantum Mechanics',
    Title == 'Gender and the Musical Canon' ~ 'Gender and the Musical Canon',
    Title == 'Hablar español en Estados Unidos : la sociopolítica del lenguaje / Jennifer Leeman y Janet M. Fuller' ~ 'Hablar español en Estados Unidos',
    Title == 'Herland' ~ 'Herland',
    Title == 'Humble, Hungry, Smart: The Three Universal Traits of Great Team Players' ~ 'Humble, Hungry, Smart',
    Title == 'International Trade and Agriculture : Theories and Practices' ~ 'International Trade and Agriculture',
    Title == 'Introduction to American Deaf Culture' ~ 'Introduction to American Deaf Culture',
    Title == 'Introduction to Probability Models' ~ 'Introduction to Probability Models',
    Title == 'Introduction to Stochastic Processes' ~ 'Introduction to Stochastic Processes',
    Title == 'Language, Truth and Logic' ~ 'Language, Truth and Logic',
    Title == 'Linear Systems Theory : Second Edition' ~ 'Linear Systems Theory: Second Edition',
    Title == 'Managing Hospitality Organizations' ~ 'Managing Hospitality Organizations',
    Title == 'Obit' ~ 'Obit',
    Title == 'Quicksand' ~ 'Quicksand',
    Title == 'R for Political Science Research : An Introduction for Absolute Beginners' ~ 'R for Political Science Research',
    Title == 'Race and Reunion : The Civil War in American Memory' ~ 'Race and Reunion',
    Title == 'Recent Developments in Southeastern Archaeology : From Colonization to Complexity / David G. Anderson and Kenneth E. Sassaman' ~ 'Recent Developments in Southeastern Archaeology',
    Title == 'Restoring Sanctuary : A New Operating System for Trauma-Informed Systems of Care' ~ 'Restoring Sanctuary',
    Title == 'Rules of Play : Game Design Fundamentals' ~ 'Rules of Play: Game Design Fundamentals',
    Title == 'Scraping By : Wage Labor, Slavery, and Survival in Early Baltimore' ~ 'Scraping By: Wage Labor, Slavery, and Survival in Early Baltimore',
    Title == 'Social Work Values and Ethics' ~ 'Social Work Values and Ethics',
    Title == 'Statistical Mechanics: Principles and Selected Applications' ~ 'Statistical Mechanics',
    Title == 'Storming Heaven : A Novel' ~ 'Storming Heaven',
    Title == 'Storytelling with you : plan, create, and deliver a stellar presentation / Cole Nussbaumer Knaflic ; illustrations by Catherine Madden' ~ 'Storytelling with You: Plan, Create, and Deliver a Stellar Presentation',
    Title == 'Survey Research and Analysis' ~ 'Survey Research and Analysis',
    Title == 'Teaching English As a Foreign or Second Language, Third Edition : A Self-Development and Methodology Guide' ~ 'Teaching English As a Foreign or Second Language, Third Edition',
    Title == 'The Antinomian Controversy, 1636-1638 : A Documentary History' ~ 'The Antinomian Controversy, 1636-1638',
    Title == 'The Basics of Public Budgeting and Financial Management: A Handbook for Academics and Practitioners' ~ 'Basics of Public Budgeting and Financial Management: A Handbook for Academics and Practitioners',
    Title == 'The Dead' ~ 'The Dead',
    Title == 'The Death of Ivan Ilyich' ~ 'The Death of Ivan Ilyich',
    Title == 'The Great Arizona Orphan Abduction' ~ 'The Great Arizona Orphan Abduction',
    Title == 'The Social Contract' ~ 'The Social Contract',
    Title == 'The Student Leadership Challenge: Student Workbook and Leadership Journal' ~ 'The Student Leadership Challenge: Student Workbook and Leadership Journal',
    Title == 'The Two Fundamental Problems of Ethics' ~ 'The Two Fundamental Problems of Ethics',
    Title == 'The World Is a High Hill: Stories about Jamaican Women' ~ 'World Is A High Hill',
    Title == 'Three Tales' ~ 'Three Tales',
    Title == 'Time Series Econometrics : Learning Through Replication' ~ 'Time Series Econometrics',
    Title == 'Trauma-Focused ACT' ~ "Trauma-Focused ACT: A Practitioner's Guide to Working with Mind, Body, and Emotion Using Acceptance and Commitment Therapy",
    Title == 'Writing a Research Paper in Political Science : A Practical Guide to Inquiry, Structure, and Methods' ~ 'Writing a Research Paper in Political Science',
      
      
    # Summer 2026  
    Title == 'Controversies in Contemporary Advertising' ~ 'Controversies in Contemporary Advertising',
    .default = 'Title Not Cleaned Properly'
  )
) |>
  select(CleanTitle, Semester, `Total cost`)

cleanTextbookOrders
```



# Join the Cost to the Usage

```{r}
colnames(filteredCosts) <- c('Title', 'Semester', 'Library Cost')
colnames(cleanTextbookOrders) <- c('Title', 'Semester', 'Library Cost')

allCosts <- rbind(filteredCosts, cleanTextbookOrders) |>
  group_by(Title, Semester) |>
  summarise(`Library Cost` = sum(`Library Cost`))

allCosts
```





```{r}
usageCost <- left_join(bookstoreTitleUsage, allCosts, by = c('UsageTitle' = 'Title', 'Semester' = 'Semester')) |>
  mutate(costUse = ifelse(is.na(`Library Cost`) == TRUE, NA, round(`Library Cost` / Total_Usage, 2)),
         boughtAtTime = ifelse(is.na(`Library Cost`) == TRUE, 'No', 'Yes'))

usageCost
```



# VolBooks Financial Savings Tracking


## Load Data

FOR EACH SEMESTER, if this data is provided, copy the code chunk for a semester and add it in.


```{r}
savingsFall25 <- read_excel('Fall 2025 Library Savings for VolBooks.xlsx') |>
  mutate(Semester = 'Fall 2025') |>
  filter(Savings < 60000) #This removes a total row from the savings data
savingsSpring26 <- read_excel('Spring 2026 Library Savings for VolBooks.xlsx') |>
  mutate(Semester = 'Spring 2026') |>
  filter(Savings < 221430) #Same removal of the total row

allSavings <- rbind(savingsFall25, savingsSpring26) |>
  mutate(`Total Students Active/Participating` = as.numeric(`Total Students Active/Participating`))

allSavings
```


```{r}
write_xlsx(allSavings, 'Raw Savings.xlsx')
```


# Get Amount Saved by Semester


```{r}
semesterSavings <- allSavings |>
  group_by(Semester) |>
  summarise(TotalSavings = sum(Savings)
            )

allTracking <- left_join(joinC, semesterSavings, by = 'Semester')

allTracking
```



# Export the Semester Tracking File

```{r}
write_xlsx(allTracking, 'VolBooks Textbook Tracking by Semester.xlsx')
```





## Clean up Titles

FOR EACH SEMESTER, Line up the titles being provided to the usage titles in bookstoreListShort. 


```{r}
cleanSavings <- allSavings |>
  mutate(SavingsTitle = case_when(
    Title == '58-IN-MIND: MULTILINGUAL TEACHING STRATEGIES FOR DIVERSE DEAF STUDENTS' ~ '58-IN-MIND',
    Title == 'A Field Guide to Grad School' ~ 'A Field Guide to Grad School',
    Title == 'A COURSE IN ENUMERATION PROBABILITY, A GRADUATE COURSE' ~ 'A Course in Enumeration Probability, a Graduate Course',    
    Title == 'A COURSE IN MATHEMATICAL MODELINGb' ~ 'A Course in Mathematical Modeling',
    Title == 'A Field Guide to Grad School' ~ 'A Field Guide to Grad School',
    Title == 'A SHORT COURSE IN READING FRENCH' ~ 'A Short Course in Reading French',   
    Title == 'ACADEMY OF NUTRITION AND DIETETICS POCKET GUIDE TO NUTRITION ASSESSMENT' ~ 'Academy of Nutrition & Dietetics Pocket Guide to Nutrition Assessment',   
    Title == 'ACT Made Simple' ~ 'ACT Made Simple',
    Title == 'AFFRILACHIA' ~ 'Affrilachia: Poems',
    Title == 'AFRICAN SLAVERY IN LATIN AMERICA & THE CARIBBEAN' ~ 'African Slavery in Latin America and the Caribbean',
    Title == 'ALWAYS GET THE NAME OF THE DOG' ~ 'Always Get The Name Of The Dog : A Guide To Media Interviewing',
    Title == 'AMERICAN DEMOCRACY IN PERIL' ~ 'American Democracy In Peril : Eight Challenges To Americas Future',
    Title == 'American Military Life in the 21st Century : Social, Cultural, and Economic Issues and Trends [2 Volumes]' ~ 'American Military Life in the 21st Century: Social, Cultural, and Economic Issues and Trends [2 Volumes]',
    Title == 'AN INTRO TO SCIENTIFIC COMPUTING' ~ 'An Introduction to Scientific Computing',    
    Title == 'AN UNKINDNESS OF GHOSTS' ~ 'An Unkindness of Ghosts',
    Title == 'APPEALS IN MODERN RHETORIC' ~ 'Appeals in Modern Rhetoric',
    Title == 'APPLIED ARTIFICIAL INTELLIGENCE IN BUSINESS' ~ 'Applied Artificial Intelligence in Business',
    Title == 'ASSESSMENT IN COUNSELING' ~ 'Assessment in Counseling: Procedures and Practices',    
    Title == 'ASSESSMENT IN STUDENT AFFAIRS' ~ 'Assessment in Student Affairs',
    Title == 'BIOMATERIALS SCIENCE: AN INTRODUCTION TO MATERIALS IN MEDICINE' ~ 'Biomaterials Science',
    Title == 'BIOMECHANICS OF MOVEMENT: THE SCIENCE OF SPORTS, ROBOTICS, AND REHABILITATION' ~ 'Biomechanics of Movement',
    Title == 'BIOMECHANICS OF MOVEMENT' ~ 'Biomechanics of Movement',
    Title == 'BRAIDING SWEETGRASS: INDIGENOUS WISDOM, SCIENTIFIC KNOWLEDGE AND THE TEACHINGS OF PLANTS' ~ 'Braiding Sweetgrass',    
    Title == 'BUILDING SMALL: A TOOLKIT FOR REAL ESTATE ENTREPRENEURS, CIVIC LEADERS, AND GREAT COMMUNITIES' ~ 'Building Small', 
    Title == 'BUILDING THE AMERICAN REPUBLIC, VOLUME 2' ~ 'Building The American Republic, Volume 2 : A Narrative History From 1877',
    Title == 'CASE STUDIES IN DEAF EDUCATION' ~ 'Case Studies in Deaf Education',    
    Title == 'CATALOG OF UNBASHED GRATITUDE' ~ 'Catalog of Unabashed Gratitude',
    Title == 'COMPUTER ORGANIZATION AND DESIGN ARM EDITION' ~ 'Computer Organization And Design Arm Edition : The Hardware Software Interface',
    Title == 'Concise Guide to Child and Adolescent Psychiatry' ~ 'Concise Guide to Child and Adolescent Psychiatry',
    Title == 'CONCISE GUIDE TO CHILD AND ADOLESCENT PSYCHIATRY' ~ 'Concise Guide to Child and Adolescent Psychiatry',
    Title == 'CONDENSED MATTER PHYSICS' ~ 'Condensed Matter Physics, Second Edition',
    Title == 'CONFLICT RESOLUTION FOR THE HELPING PROFESSIONS' ~ 'Conflict Resolution for the Helping Professions',
    Title == 'Core Values in School Librarianship' ~ 'Core Values in School Librarianship',
    Title == 'Crack : Rock Cocaine, Street Capitalism, and the Decade of Greed' ~ 'Crack',
    Title == 'CRACKED NOT BROKEN' ~ 'Cracked, Not Broken',
    Title == 'Deaf Culture: Exploring Deaf Communities in the United States' ~ 'Deaf Culture',
    Title == 'DEAF PEOPLE AND SOCIETY' ~ 'Deaf People and Society',
    Title == 'DEBATING REFORM' ~ 'Debating Reform : Conflicting Perspectives on How to Fix the American Political System',
    Title == 'DEFI AND THE FUTURE OF FINANCE' ~ 'DeFi and the Future of Finance',
    Title == 'DEMAND AND SUPPLY INTEGRATION' ~ 'Demand and Supply Integration',
    Title == 'DIFFERENTIAL GEOMETRY' ~ 'Differential Geometry: Manifolds, Curves, and Surfaces',
    Title == 'DUST BOWLS OF EMPIRE: IMPERIALISM, ENVIRONMENTAL POLITICS, AND THE INJUSTICE OF' ~ 'Dust Bowls of Empire',
    Title == 'ENVIROMEDICS: THE IMPACT OF CLIMATE CHANGE ON HUMAN HEALTH' ~ 'Enviromedics',
    Title == 'ESSENTIALS OF ASSESSMENT REPORT WRITING' ~ 'Essentials of Assessment Report Writing',
    Title == 'ESSENTIALS OF FOOD SCIENCE' ~ 'Essentials of Food Science',
    Title == 'EVELINA' ~ "Evelina: Or the History of A Young Lady's Entrance into the World",
    Title == 'Exactly How to Sell: The Sales Guide for Non-Sales Professionals' ~ 'Exactly How to Sell',
    Title == 'FIGHTING AGAINST INJUSTICE OF STATE' ~ 'Fighting Against the Injustice of the State and Globalization',
    Title == 'FINANCE FOR REAL ESTATE DEVELOPMENT' ~ 'Finance for Real Estate Development',
    Title == 'FINANCIAL LITERACY FOR MANAGERS' ~ 'Financial Literacy for Managers',
    Title == 'FISHING THROUGH THE APOCALYPSE' ~ 'Fishing Through the Apocalypse',
    Title == 'FOREST MANAGEMENT AND PLANNING' ~ 'Forest Management and Planning',
    Title == 'FUNDAMENTALS OF PHYSICS II' ~ 'Fundamentals of Physics II: Electromagnetism, Optics, and Quantum Mechanics',
    Title == 'GENDER AND THE MUSICAL CANON' ~ 'Gender and the Musical Canon',
    Title == 'GENKI: An Integrated Course in Elementary Japanese 1 [3rd Edition] Workbook' ~ 'GENKI: An Integrated Course in Elementary Japanese Ⅰ　WORKBOOK THIRD EDITION 初級日本語 げんきⅠ ワークブック　 第3版',
    Title == 'GETTING REAL ABOUT INEQUALITY' ~ 'Getting Real About Inequality: Intersectionality in Real Life',
    Title == 'Global Health Law & Policy' ~ 'Global Health Law and Policy',
    Title == 'GLOBAL WRITING FOR PUBLIC RELATIONS' ~ 'Global Writing For Public Relations : Connecting In English With Stakeholders And Publics Worldwide',
    Title == 'GLOBALIZATION OF EDUCATION' ~ 'Globalization of Education',
    Title == 'GOVERNMENT AND POLITICS IN TENNESSEE' ~ 'Government and Politics in Tennessee',
    Title == 'HABLAR ESPANOL EN ESTADOS UNIDOS : LA SOCIOPOLITICA DEL LENGUAJE' ~ 'Hablar español en Estados Unidos',
    Title == 'HANDBOOK F/CLASSICAL RESEARCH' ~ 'Handbook for Classical Research',
    Title == 'HOW TO KEEP YOUR COOL' ~ 'How to Keep Your Cool',
    Title == 'HUMAN OSTEOLOGY 3RD ED W/LIFETIEM ACCESS' ~ 'Human Osteology',
    Title == 'HUMAN RIGHTS AND SOCIAL JUSTICE IN A GLOBAL PERSPECTIVE' ~ 'Human Rights and Social Justice in a Global Perspective: An Introduction to International Social Work',
    Title == 'INFORMATION SCIENCE' ~ 'Information Science : The Basics',
    Title == 'INTERNATIONAL TRADE AND AGRICULTURE' ~ 'International Trade and Agriculture',
    Title == 'INTRODUCTION TO AMERICAN DEAF CULTURE' ~ 'Introduction to American Deaf Culture',
    Title == 'INTRODUCTION TO APPLIED NONLINEAR DYNAMICAL SYSTEMS AND CHAOS' ~ 'Introduction to Applied Nonlinear Dynamical Systems and Chaos',
    Title == 'INTRODUCTION TO INDUSTRIAL ORGANIZATION, SECOND EDITION' ~ 'Introduction to Industrial Organization, Second Edition',
    Title == 'INTRODUCTION TO PARTIAL DIFFERENTIAL EQUATIONS' ~ 'Introduction to Partial Differential Equations',
    Title == 'INTRODUCTION TO STOCHASTIC PROCESSES' ~ 'Introduction to Stochastic Processes',
    Title == 'JUST PRACTICE: A SOCIAL JUSTICE APPROACH TO SOCIAL WORK' ~ 'Just Practice: A Social Justice Approach to Social Work',
    Title == 'LANGUAGE, TRUTH AND LOGIC' ~ 'Language, Truth and Logic',
    Title == 'LEADING WITH QUESTIONS' ~ 'Leading with Questions: How Leaders Discover Powerful Answers by Knowing How and What to Ask',
    Title == 'Lincoln and the Triumph of the Nation' ~ 'Lincoln and the Triumph of the Nation',
    Title == 'LINGUISTICS OF ASL' ~ 'Linguistics of American Sign Language, 5th Ed.',
    Title == 'MAKING AND TINKERING WITH STEM: SOLVING DESIGN CHALLENGES WITH YOUNG CHILDREN' ~ 'Making and Tinkering with STEM',
    Title == 'MAKING RACE AND NATION' ~ 'Making Race and Nation',
    Title == 'MASTERING QGIS' ~ 'Mastering QGIS - Second Edition',
    Title == 'MASTERING QGIS - SECOND EDITION' ~ 'Mastering QGIS - Second Edition',
    Title == 'Mathematical Methods for Physicists' ~ 'Mathematical Methods for Physicists (Seventh Edition)',
    Title == 'MAXIMIZING THE IMPACT OF COMICS IN YOUR LIBRARY' ~ 'Maximizing the Impact of Comics in Your Library: Graphic Novels, Manga, and More',
    Title == 'METALS AND SOCIETY' ~ 'Metals and Society',
    Title == 'MILK AND FILTH' ~ 'Milk and Filth',
    Title == 'MODULAR FORMS: A CLASSICAL/COMPUTATIONAL INTRO' ~ 'Modular Forms: A Classical And Computational Introduction',
    Title == "MY GRANDMOTHER'S HANDS" ~ "My Grandmother's Hands: Racialized Trauma and the Pathway to Mending our Hearts and Bodies",
    Title == "ORTNER'S IDENTIFICATION OF PATHOLOGICAL CONDITIONS" ~ "Ortner's Identification of Pathological Conditions in Human Skeletal Remains",
    Title == 'Paradise: By the winner of the Nobel Prize in Literature 2021' ~ 'Paradise',
    Title == 'PEDAGOGY OF OPPRESSED' ~ 'Pedagogy of the Oppressed',
    Title == 'Phases of Terrorism in the Age of Globalization' ~ 'Phases of Terrorism in the Age of Globalization',
    Title == 'PLANNING FOR PLAY, OBSERVATION, AND LEARNING IN PRESCHOOL AND KINDERGARTEN' ~ 'Planning for Play, Observation, and Learning in Preschool and Kindergarten',
    Title == 'POLITICAL STYLE: THE ARTISTRY OF POWER' ~ 'Political Style',
    Title == 'Power' ~ 'POWER',
    Title == 'PRACTICAL GUIDE TO COMMERCIAL REAL ESTATE TRANSACTIONS' ~ 'A Practical Guide to Commercial Real Estate Transactions: From Contract to Closing',
    Title == 'PROBABILITY, A GRADUATE COURSE' ~ 'Probability: A Graduate Course',
    Title == 'PUBLIC SPEAKING FOR ENGINEERS' ~ 'Public Speaking for Engineers: Communicating Effectively with Clients, the Public, and Local Government',
    Title == 'R for Political Science Research' ~ 'R for Political Science Research',
    Title == 'RACE AND REUNION' ~ 'Race and Reunion',
    Title == 'RACIAL THEORIES IN SOCIAL SCIENCE' ~ 'Racial Theories in Social Science: A Systemic Racism Critique',
    Title == 'RECENT DEVELOPMENT IN SOUTHEASTERN ARCH' ~ 'Recent Developments in Southeastern Archaeology',
    Title == 'REGRESSION ANALYSIS' ~ 'Regression Analysis and Linear Models',
    Title == 'Religion in a Changing Workplace' ~ 'Religion in a Changing Workplace',
    Title == 'RESEARCH METHODS FOR SOCIAL WORK' ~ 'Research Methods For Social Work : A Problem-Based Approach',
    Title == 'RESPONSIBLE CONDUCT OF RESEARCH' ~ 'Responsible Conduct of Research',
    Title == 'RULES OF PLAY' ~ 'Rules of Play: Game Design Fundamentals',
    Title == 'SCIENCE NOTEBOOKS IN STUDENT-CENTERED CLASSROOMS' ~ 'Science Notebooks in Student-Centered Classrooms',
    Title == 'SCRAPING BY' ~ 'Scraping By: Wage Labor, Slavery, and Survival in Early Baltimore',
    Title == 'SILAS MARNER' ~ 'Silas Marner: The Weaver of Raveloe',
    Title == 'SKILL AQUISITION IN SPORT' ~ 'Skill Acquisition in Sport',
    Title == 'SOCIAL MOVEMENTS' ~ 'Social Movements: The Structure of Collective Mobilization',
    Title == 'SOCIAL THEORY OF INERNATIONAL POLITICS' ~ 'Social Theory of International Politics',
    Title == 'Social Work Values and Ethics' ~ 'Social Work Values and Ethics',
    Title == 'SOCRATIC QUESTIONING FOR THERAPISTS AND COUNSELORS' ~ 'Socratic Questioning for Therapists and Counselors',
    Title == 'SOUNDING LIKE A NO-NO'~ 'Sounding Like a No-No',
    Title == 'Speech to Print' ~ 'Speech to Print',
    Title == "STOELTING'S PHARMACOLOGY AND PHYSIOLOGY IN ANESTHETIC PRACTICE" ~ "Stoelting's Pharmacology and Physiology in Anesthetic Practice",
    Title == 'Story Proof' ~ 'Story Proof: The Science Behind the Startling Power of Story',
    Title == 'STORYTELLING WITH DATA' ~ 'Storytelling with Data',
    Title == 'STORYTELLING WITH YOU' ~ 'Storytelling with You: Plan, Create, and Deliver a Stellar Presentation',
    Title == 'STRANGE AS THIS WEATHER HAS BEEN: A NOVEL' ~ 'Strange As This Weather Has Been',
    Title == 'STRATEGY IN 3D' ~ 'Strategy in 3D',
    Title == 'SUN ALSO RISES' ~ 'The Sun Also Rises',
    Title == 'SUPPLY CHAIN PLANNING AND ANALYTICS' ~ 'Supply Chain Planning and Analytics',
    Title == 'SURVEY RESEARCH AND ANALYSIS' ~ 'Survey Research and Analysis',
    Title == 'SYSTEMATIC INSTRUCTION FOR STUDENTS WITH MODERATE AND SEVERE DISABILITIES' ~ 'Systematic Instruction for Students with Moderate and Severe Disabilities',
    Title == 'SYSTEMATIC INSTRUCTION FOR STUDENTS WITH MODERATE TO SEVER DISABILITIES' ~ 'Systematic Instruction for Students with Moderate and Severe Disabilities',
    Title == 'Systems Thinking For Social Change' ~ 'Systems Thinking For Social Change: A Practical Guide To Solving Complex Problems, Avoiding Unintended Consequences, And Achieving Lasting Results',
    Title == 'TEACHING AND LEARNING STEM' ~ 'Teaching and Learning STEM',
    Title == 'TEACHING ENGLISH AS A FOREIGN LANGUAGE' ~ 'Teaching English As a Foreign or Second Language, Third Edition',
    Title == 'Teaching English as a Foreign or Second Language' ~ 'Teaching English As a Foreign or Second Language, Third Edition',
    Title == "TEACHING STRINGS IN TODAY'S CLASSROOM" ~ "Teaching Strings In Today's Classroom : A Guide For Group Instruction",
    Title == 'THE ANTINOMIAN CONTROVERSY' ~ 'The Antinomian Controversy, 1636-1638',
    Title == 'THE ART OF THE PITCH' ~ 'The Art of the Pitch',
    Title == 'The Basics of Public Budgeting and Financial Management' ~ 'Basics of Public Budgeting and Financial Management: A Handbook for Academics and Practitioners',
    Title == 'THE BEAST WITHIN' ~ 'The Beast Within : Animals In The Middle Ages',
    Title == 'THE BUDDHIST WORLD OF SOUTHEAST ASIA' ~ 'The Buddhist World of Southeast Asia',
    Title == 'The Comprehensive Guide to Interdisciplinary Veterinary Social Work' ~ 'The Comprehensive Guide to Interdisciplinary Veterinary Social Work',
    Title == 'THE COMPREHENSIVE GUIDE TO INTERDISCIPLINARY VETERINARY SOCIAL WORK' ~ 'The Comprehensive Guide to Interdisciplinary Veterinary Social Work',
    Title == 'THE FASCINATING WORLD OF GRAPH THEORY' ~ 'The Fascinating World of Graph Theory',
    Title == 'THE HISTORY OF THE AMERICAN MUSICAL THEATRE' ~ 'A History Of The American Musical Theatre',
    Title == 'THE IDEAL TEAM PLAYER' ~ 'The Ideal Team Player: How to Recognize and Cultivate the Three Essential Virtues',
    Title == 'THE LIFE OF SAINT KATHERINE OF ALEXANDRIA' ~ 'The Life of Saint Katherine of Alexandria',
    Title == 'THE MITKI AND THE ART OF POSTMODERN PROTEST IN RUSSIA' ~ 'The Mitki and the Art of Postmodern Protest in Russia',
    Title == 'THE MUSEUM OF UNNATURAL HISTORIES' ~ 'The Museum of Unnatural Histories',
    Title == 'THE NEW JIM CROW: MASS INCARCERATION IN THE AGE OF COLORBLINDNESS' ~ 'The New Jim Crow',
    Title == 'THE STUDENT LEADERSHIP CHALLENGE' ~ 'The Student Leadership Challenge: Student Workbook and Leadership Journal',
    Title == 'THE TROJANS AND THEIR NEIGHBOURS' ~ 'The Trojans and Their Neighbours',
    Title == 'THE TWO FUNDAMENTAL PROBLEMS OF ETHICS' ~ 'The Two Fundamental Problems of Ethics',
    Title == 'THE WOLD IS A HIGH HILL' ~ 'World is a High Hill',
    Title == 'THE WORLD OF MEXICAN MIGRANTS: THE ROCK AND THE HARD PLACE' ~ 'The World of Mexican Migrants',
    Title == 'THROUGH THE ARC OF THE RAIN FOREST' ~ 'Through the Arc of the Rain Forest',
    Title == 'TIME SERIES ECONOMETRICS: LEARNING THROUGH REPLICATION' ~ 'Time Series Econometrics',
    Title == 'Transport Modeling for Environmental Engineers and Scientists' ~ 'Transport Modeling for Environmental Engineers and Scientists',
    Title == 'TRAUMA-FOCUSED ACT' ~ "Trauma-Focused ACT: A Practitioner's Guide to Working with Mind, Body, and Emotion Using Acceptance and Commitment Therapy",
    Title == 'UNIVERSITY PHYSICS VOLUME 3' ~ 'University Physics: Volume 3',
    Title == 'WATER 4.0' ~ 'Water 4. 0',
    Title == 'WHAT REALLY WORKS WITH EXCEPTIONAL LEARNERS' ~ 'What Really Works with Exceptional Learners',
    Title == "WHERE'S THE MATH?: BOOKS, GAMES, AND ROUTINES TO SPARK CHILDREN'S THINKING" ~ "Where's the Math?",
    Title == 'WHY PEOPLE DIE BY SUICIDE' ~ 'Why People Die by Suicide',
    Title == 'WORLD RELIGIONS IN SEVEN SENTENCES' ~ 'World Religions in Seven Sentences: A Small Introduction to a Vast Topic',
    Title == 'YAGUARETE WHITE' ~ 'Yaguareté White',
    Title == 'ZAMI: A NEW SPELLING OF MY NAME' ~ 'Zami',
    
    
    .default = str_to_title(Title)
  ))  |>
  group_by(SavingsTitle, Semester) |>
  summarise(CoursesUsed = n(),
            BookPrice = mean(`Net Price`),
            StudentsParticipating = sum(`Total Students Active/Participating`),
            Savings = sum(Savings))

cleanSavings

```


```{r}
write_xlsx(cleanSavings, 'Savings Check.xlsx')
```



## Join to Usage and Cost


```{r}
usageCostSavings <- left_join(usageCost, cleanSavings, by = c('UsageTitle' = 'SavingsTitle', 'Semester' = 'Semester')) |>
  mutate(Has_Savings = ifelse(is.na(Savings) == FALSE, 'Yes', 'No'))

usageCostSavings
```




## Export Full Title Level Information



```{r}
write_xlsx(usageCostSavings, 'Usage Cost and Savings of VolBooks Titles.xlsx')
```




NEXT STEPS:




* Looking to update the VolBooks PowerBI dashboard?

Go to the locally saved PowerBI file and refresh the data sources. Make sure to check to make sure all title matching lines up properly.


* Need to add more usage data?

Check the APCS SharePoint for the Usage Master Vendor List to see how to access the needed usage.


* Looking to add more semesters of data?

Gather the files and clean up the data as mentioned in each code chunk above.


* Looking to create a report for VolBooks?

The PowerBI dashboard should have the visuals you'll need to insert into your report. If you are looking for visuals made here in R instead, see the code below for some potential ideas and places to start.













The below code is only needed if making a report using R visuals and not the PowerBI report.


# Clean up the Data for the Final Report



## Create GT Table for Total Cost


```{r}
costUseTable <- data.frame(
  Titles = dim(usageCost)[1],
  Titles_Bought = sum(ifelse(is.na(usageCost$`Transaction Expenditure Amount`) == FALSE, 1, 0)),
  Amount_Spent = sum(ifelse(is.na(usageCost$`Transaction Expenditure Amount`) == FALSE, usageCost$`Transaction Expenditure Amount`, 0))
) |>
  mutate(Amount_Spent = substr(paste('$', formatC(Amount_Spent, big.mark = ',', format = 'f')), 1, 10))

costUseTable
```


```{r}
costGT <- costUseTable |>
  gt() |>
  tab_header(title = md('**Fall 2025 Textbook Cost Overview**')) |>
  cols_align(align = 'center', columns = c('Titles', 'Titles_Bought', 'Amount_Spent')) |>
  opt_stylize(style = 5, color = 'green') |>
  cols_label(Titles = 'Unique Titles', Titles_Bought = 'Titles Bought in Fall 2025', Amount_Spent = '$ Spent in Fall 2025') |>
  cols_width(everything() ~ px(200)) |>
  opt_table_font(
    font = 'rounded-sans',
    size = 16
  )

costGT
```



# Get Usage and Cost Per Use Numbers


```{r}
newPurchase <- usageCost |>
  filter(is.na(`Transaction Expenditure Amount`) == FALSE)

newPurchaseUse <- sum(newPurchase$Total_Usage)

newPurchaseCostUse <- round(sum(newPurchase$`Transaction Expenditure Amount`) / (2 * newPurchaseUse), 2)

allUsage <- sum(usageCost$Total_Usage)
```



```{r}
costUseDF <- data.frame(
  Total_Cost = sum(ifelse(is.na(usageCost$`Transaction Expenditure Amount`) == FALSE, usageCost$`Transaction Expenditure Amount`, 0)),
  New_Purchase_Use = newPurchaseUse,
  New_Purchase_Cost_Use = newPurchaseCostUse
) |>
  mutate(New_Purchase_Cost_Use = substr(paste('$', formatC(New_Purchase_Cost_Use, big.mark = ',', format = 'f')), 1, 6),
         Total_Cost = substr(paste('$', formatC(Total_Cost, big.mark = ',', format = 'f')), 1, 10))

costUseDF
```


```{r}
usageGT <- costUseDF |>
  gt() |>
  tab_header(title = md('**Fall 2025 Textbook Cost Per Use for New Titles**')) |>
  cols_align(align = 'center', columns = c('Total_Cost', 'New_Purchase_Use', 'New_Purchase_Cost_Use')) |>
  opt_stylize(style = 5, color = 'green') |>
  cols_label(Total_Cost = 'Fall 2025 Cost', New_Purchase_Use = 'Newly Bought Book Usage', New_Purchase_Cost_Use = 'Cost Per Use') |>
  cols_width(everything() ~ px(200)) |>
  opt_table_font(
    font = 'rounded-sans',
    size = 16
  )

usageGT
```






## Bucket Titles


```{r}
bookstoreBuckets <- usageCost |>
  mutate(usageBucket = case_when(
    is.na(Total_Usage) == TRUE | Total_Usage == 0 ~ 'None',
    Total_Usage <= 10 & Total_Usage > 0 & is.na(Total_Usage) == FALSE ~ 'Low (1-10)',
    (Total_Usage > 10 & Total_Usage <= 100) & is.na(Total_Usage) == FALSE ~ 'Mid (11-100)',
    Total_Usage > 100 & is.na(Total_Usage) == FALSE ~ 'High (100+)'
  ))

bookstoreBuckets$usageBucket <- factor(bookstoreBuckets$usageBucket, levels = c('High (100+)', 'Mid (11-100)', 'Low (1-10)', 'None'))

bookCounts <- bookstoreBuckets |>
  group_by(usageBucket) |>
  summarise(n = n())

bookCounts
```

## Create Pie Chart


```{r}
ggplot(bookCounts, aes(x = '', y = n, fill = usageBucket)) +
  geom_col() +
  coord_polar(theta = "y") +
  geom_label(aes(label = n),
             color = 'white',
             position = position_stack(vjust = 0.4),
             show.legend = FALSE) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c('#117733', '#ddcc77', '#ed7117', '#882255')) +
  theme(axis.text = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks = element_blank(),
        axis.title = element_blank(),
        panel.grid = element_blank(),
        panel.background = element_rect(fill = "#ffffff"),
        plot.background = element_rect(fill = "#ffffff"),
        legend.background = element_rect(fill = "#ffffff")) +
  ggtitle('Textbook Usage by Bucket Fall 2025') +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(title = '# of Uses'))

ggsave('Textbook Usage by Bucket Fall 2025.png', width = 6, height = 6, units = 'in', dpi = 300)
```



# Usage of the Top Used Books


```{r}
topUse <- usageCost |>
  filter(Total_Usage > 100) |>
  arrange(desc(Total_Usage)) |>
  mutate(Title = ifelse(Title == 'GENKI: An Integrated Course in Elementary Japanese Ⅰ　WORKBOOK THIRD EDITION 初級日本語 げんきⅠ ワークブック　 第3版',  ' GENKI: An Integrated Course in Elementary Japanese WORKBOOK THIRD EDITION', Title))

topUse
```



# Create Bar Chart


```{r}
ggplot(topUse, aes(x = reorder(Title, Total_Usage), y = Total_Usage)) +
  geom_bar(position = 'dodge', stat = 'identity', fill = '#ff8200') +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = 'Set1') +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(x = 'Title', y = 'Requests', title = 'Highly Used Textbooks in Fall 2025') +
  geom_text(aes(label = Total_Usage), hjust = 1, size = 10, color = '#ffffff') +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 24,
                                  color = '#4b4b4b',
                                  face = 'bold')) +
  theme(legend.text = element_text(size = 12,
                                   color = '#4b4b4b',
                                   face = 'bold')) +
  theme(axis.title.x = element_text(size = 18,
                                    color = '#4b4b4b',
                                    face = 'bold')) +
  theme(axis.title.y = element_text(size = 18,
                                    color = '#4b4b4b',
                                    face = 'bold')) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(color = '#4b4b4b',
                                   face = 'bold',
                                   angle = 90,
                                   size = 14)) +
  theme(axis.text.y = element_text(color = '#4b4b4b',
                                   face = 'bold',
                                   size = 14)) +
  theme(legend.title = element_blank()) +
  theme(plot.caption = element_text(size = 10,
                                    color = '#4b4b4b')) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = function(x) str_wrap(x, width = 30))

ggsave('Highly Used Textbooks in Fall 2025.png', width = 18, height = 12, units = 'in', dpi = 300)
```



# Find Cost/Use for Titles


```{r}
titleCostUse <- usageCost |>
  mutate(Cost_Use = `Transaction Expenditure Amount` / (Total_Usage * 2)) |>
  filter(is.na(`Transaction Expenditure Amount`) == FALSE) |>
  mutate(costUseBucket = case_when(
    Total_Usage == 0 ~ 'No Usage',
    Cost_Use < 20 ~ 'Under $20',
    Cost_Use > 20 ~ 'Over $20'
  ))

titleCostUse
```



## Create Pie Chart for Cost/Use



```{r}
costUseCounts <- titleCostUse |>
  group_by(costUseBucket) |>
  summarise(n = n())

costUseCounts$costUseBucket <- factor(costUseCounts$costUseBucket, levels = c('Over $20', 'Under $20', 'No Usage'))
  
  
ggplot(costUseCounts, aes(x = '', y = n, fill = costUseBucket)) +
  geom_col() +
  coord_polar(theta = "y") +
  geom_label(aes(label = n),
             color = 'white',
             position = position_stack(vjust = 0.4),
             show.legend = FALSE) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c('#ddcc77', '#117733', '#882255')) +
  theme(axis.text = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks = element_blank(),
        axis.title = element_blank(),
        panel.grid = element_blank(),
        panel.background = element_rect(fill = "#ffffff"),
        plot.background = element_rect(fill = "#ffffff"),
        legend.background = element_rect(fill = "#ffffff")) +
  ggtitle('Textbook Usage by Cost Per Use Bucket Fall 2025') +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(title = 'Cost/Use'))

ggsave('Textbook Usage by Cost Per Use Bucket Fall 2025.png', width = 6, height = 6, units = 'in', dpi = 300)
```


# Cost/Use Table for Used Books


```{r}
costUseTitles <- joinedCostUse |>
  filter(is.na(Requests) == FALSE & Requests != 0)

costUseTitles
```



```{r}
cleanTable <- costUseTitles |>
  select(Title.y, splitISBN, `Transaction Date Year-Month`, `Transaction Expenditure Amount`, Requests, costUse)

colnames(cleanTable) <- c('Title', 'ISBN', 'Transaction Year-Month', 'Expenditure', 'Requests', 'Cost/Use')

write.xlsx(cleanTable, 'Cost Per Use of the Used Textbooks Spring 2025.xlsx', rowNames = FALSE)
```
